7.question: What kind of project was Jolene working on in the beginning of January 2023?

memories.memory: 【Jolene's Project】On April 09, 2023 at 04:30 PM, Jolene stated: "Just so you know, I've been working on a big project lately - it's been tough but also really cool to watch it take shape. Can't wait to see the final result!" Deborah said: "I am waiting to hear how everything turns out. Keep up the good work!" Jolene replied: "Thanks Deb! Your support means a lot. I'll keep you updated on the progress of the project." 【Deborah Support】[April 09, 2023, 04:30 PM] Deborah stated that her support means a lot to Jolene and that she will always be there for Jolene; she also instructed Jolene to make time for the things that bring her joy. [April 09, 2023, 04:30 PM] Jolene stated that she will make sure to find time for that.

【Jolene's Project】June 26, 2023, 09:17 AM: Jolene stated that things have been intense lately, she is pushing herself to succeed and sometimes feels overwhelmed, but she is determined to overcome obstacles and achieve her goals; Deborah advised to keep up the hard work and remember to relax; Jolene thanked Deborah and reported a big breakthrough with this project, describing it as exciting and rewarding, and she shared Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a drawing of a house with a ruler and a ruler; Deborah expressed that she is really glad the project worked out.

【Water Purifier Project】On February 04, 2023, at 09:48 AM, Jolene told Deborah she had been on an emotional rollercoaster lately but was coping. Deborah replied that all good here and asked if Jolene had anything new happening lately. Jolene said she had a major milestone last week that went really well, expressing relief and pride, and noting it was a huge accomplishment for her as an engineer. Deborah said that's awesome and asked to share more about it. Jolene added that she had to plan and research a lot to design and build a sustainable water purifier for a rural community in need; it was tough, but she loved the experience. Deborah remarked that Jolene's engineering skills really made a difference for people in a rural area and asked how it felt when she saw it working. Jolene responded that it was surreal; seeing it working and providing clean water to the community was incredibly satisfying, and it reminded her of how engineering can make a difference in people's lives, giving her a sense of purpose and the feeling that she had done something good. 【Jolene Career Path】Jolene Career Path. Session Date: February 04, 2023. On February 04, 2023, at 09:48 AM, Deborah asked Jolene about her career aspirations. Jolene stated she wants to keep working in engineering and continue to make a positive impact on communities in need by creating sustainable solutions, with the goal of contributing toward making the world a better place through her work. She added that she is determined to keep going and make a difference, and that Deborah's support means a lot and her encouragement motivates her to pursue her passions.

【Deborah's Mom】On August 21, 2023 at 09:11 AM, Deborah went to a place that held a lot of memories, sat on a bench where they used to chat, and felt nostalgia, longing, and gratitude; she brought flowers there and shared images: a photo of a flower cart on a sidewalk with flowers in it and a photo of a vase of flowers on the ground in a street. She remarked that it’s amazing how a place can mean so much. Jolene then asked whether Deborah’s mother would like it. Deborah replied that her mom really loved flowers; they always made her happy; she appreciated the simple things in life. An image shared by Deborah shows a woman holding a bouquet of red roses. Jolene commented, “Wow, that’s a great photo! How did she show you to appreciate it?” Deborah concluded, “Moments like that I’ll always cherish.” 【Yoga and Mindfulness】Yoga and Mindfulness — Session Date: August 21, 2023. At 09:11 AM on August 21, 2023, Jolene asked whether they were mostly happy or a bit of everything. Deborah answered that happiness comes from taking it slow, seeing beauty in them, and finding joy. Jolene noted that they should take time to enjoy that and not let the business of life cause them to miss out on the good stuff. Deborah stated that life can be so busy that they often overlook the small things that truly matter and that they should make an effort to appreciate them more. Jolene added that slowing down and enjoying simple moments can bring a lot of balance and happiness; she is trying to do more yoga and meditation to help relax and stay focused, and asked whether Deborah practices calming habits to feel balanced. Deborah replied that yoga and meditation help her find balance and inner peace; going out for walks and staying mindful also keep her grounded; she takes similar photos on walks. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]. Jolene described the sunset photo as gorgeous and that going for a walk and feeling peaceful must be amazing. Jolene added that the calm and peaceful feeling is nice for recharging and thinking. Deborah said it's like a reboot for me. Jolene said it's like hitting the refresh button and coming back even better. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a green cushion on a floor in front of a window]. Deborah asked what is your favorite yoga pose for rest. Jolene replied that she is a fan of savasana, aka the corpse pose, which is calming and helps her let go and surrender. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a person laying on the floor with a paper bag]. Deborah commented that the photo is funny and asked how long Jolene has been doing yoga. Jolene replied that she has been doing it for 3 years, and that it is a great way to escape studying and work stress. Deborah responded that taking time to unwind is key and that that seems just right for Jolene. Jolene concluded that she is really finding her zen again. 【Jolene's Support】Jolene's Support, Session Date: August 21, 2023. On August 21, 2023, at 09:11 AM, Deborah said "Keep it up!"; Jolene said "Thanks for your support, Deb!"; Deborah said "Good luck with everything. Stay in touch."

【Mom】2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：自从我们谈过以后，我一直在思考我妈妈的影响，记住我们所爱的人很重要。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Jolene：我明白，Deb。记住并珍惜我们所爱之人的记忆非常重要。知道他们的影响仍在指引我们让人感到安慰。上周五，我和我的伴侣讨论了我们所爱之人对我们的影响以及他们的价值观对我们的意义。这是一次情感丰富的谈话，但它让我们感到更亲近，也让我们看清了真正重要的事物。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：那些类型的对话真的有助于建立关系。你能告诉我他们赋予你们的价值观吗？

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Jolene：当然！我们的亲人教会我们坚持和韧性，比如我妈妈总是说永不放弃，我伴侣的父亲教他们保持决心。他们的价值观促使我们去追求目标，例如我从事工程学，我的伴侣从事创造性事业。即使他们不在这里，我们仍然感到他们的价值观在指引我们前进。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：听到这些真的很棒，Jolene！他们的价值观在你们身上继续指引着你们，尽管他们不在。听起来你和你的伴侣正通过追求各自的热情来纪念他们。你有没有考虑把这些价值观也融入到你的工作中？
[August 26, 2023, 05:33 PM] Deborah: Hey Jolene, s 【Jolene's Projects】[Jolene's Projects]
[Session Date: August 26, 2023]

At 05:33 PM on August 26, 2023, Jolene stated: We've been figuring out how to add these values into our projects. As an engineering student, I want to use my talents to do good and help solve important problems. I'm keen on coming up with new ideas and making things more efficient to make the world a better place. My mom stressed the value of helping others, and I want to keep that in mind for my engineering projects.

Deborah: When our work ties into our values, it becomes more meaningful. What goals or ideas do you have for incorporating those values into your future projects?

Jolene: In the future, I'm aiming to work on projects that make a real difference to communities. I'm interested in sustainable initiatives and developing innovative solutions for environmental issues. I also want to get involved with organizations that focus on social causes, using my skills to help out. It's about connecting my passion for engineering with my commitment to making a positive impact.

Deborah: You've got a lot of amazing plans for the future. Which projects are you most interested in getting involved in?

Jolene: I'm keen on two projects in particular. One is focused on developing renewable energy, like solar, to help communities and reduce dependence on non-renewables. The other is finding ways to supply clean water to those with limited access. Both align with my beliefs about sustainability and assisting those in need. I still have so much to figure out before beginning, but I'm up for the challenge.

【Deborah and Jolene】Session Date: March 22, 2023. At 05:35 PM, Jolene stated that it can be tough to find time for everything and that it is really stressful. Deborah asked how Jolene manages time and stays organized with all the projects and deadlines, and whether she has tried breaking down tasks or prioritizing them. Jolene replied that it often feels overwhelming and difficult to figure out where to start. Deborah then described that recently Anna and she were sitting by the sea, watching the sunset and talking about each other, realizing that they inspire each other, and she asked what thoughts the sea in this photo makes Jolene think of. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard] 【Pomodoro Technique】Session Date: March 22, 2023. Topic: Pomodoro Technique. At 05:35 PM, Jolene states she is using the Pomodoro Technique—25 minutes work, 5-minute break—to avoid burnout but remains unable to prioritize and asks for other time-management tips. Deborah states she creates a daily schedule or to-do list and shares an example for today, with an image of a notepad listing tasks. At 05:35 PM, Jolene adds that a big stack of tasks is overwhelming and provides an example from last Friday, with an image of a notepad with notes on it on a counter. 【Eisenhower Matrix】On March 22, 2023, at 05:35 PM, Deborah said that when overloaded she uses a method to determine what's important and urgent so she stays organized and asked Jolene if she knew about it. Jolene replied that she wasn't familiar with it and asked what it was about. Deborah offered to explain, saying it helps organize things based on how important and urgent they are. Jolene asked for more details, and Deborah stated that the Eisenhower Matrix sorts tasks into four boxes, categorizing them based on their urgency and importance, and that it can be really useful for organizing and prioritizing; she shared an image: a photo of a pair of scissors sitting on top of a piece of paper. Jolene said the visualization was helpful and thanked her. Deborah replied that she was glad it was helpful and proposed they try it to see if it helps Jolene stay focused and less stressed. Jolene agreed to give it a try, saying "Fingers crossed it'll help me," and thanked Deborah.

【Engineering Project Wrap-Up】On June 06, 2023 at 03:56 PM, Jolene stated that she had finally wrapped up the tough engineering project last month and shared an image of a solar powered vehicle with a solar panel on the back. Deborah congratulated Jolene on wrapping up the project, noting that the work paid off. Jolene added that she was really proud of herself for sticking it out despite the problems and finishing it, calling it a big milestone.

【Jolene's Green Tech Outreach】[Jolene's Green Tech Outreach] [Session Date: February 09, 2023] On February 09, 2023 at 09:03 PM, Jolene proposed a volunteer program in which engineers teach STEM to underprivileged kids and suggested teaming with local schools/centers to run workshops and inviting engineers as guest speakers to show kids their career options. Deborah replied that this would be a great way to help and inspire others and asked if Jolene had a plan yet. Jolene said planning was not finished but she planned to solidify the plan and begin reaching out, and that she could start reaching out after solidifying. Deborah noted that guest speakers would provide a real-world view and asked whether Jolene had reached out to any schools or centers yet. Jolene said she had not yet reached out and wanted to solidify the plan first, but she was eager to start reaching out. Deborah expressed enthusiasm to hear how Jolene reaches out and helps the kids and asked to be informed of progress. Jolene said she would keep Deborah posted and shared sketches in the planner, with the image attached: [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a notebook with a pen and a notebook with a page of notes]. Deborah suggested she could provide more tips or information if needed. Jolene thanked Deborah and indicated she would ask if anything else was needed.

【Jolene's Community Project】On August 01, 2023, at 09:26 AM, Jolene told Debs that last week she had a huge setback with her project; she put in so much work and it all crashed and she lost everything, SO frustrating and depressing. Deborah replied: Jolene, sorry to hear that. It must be really tough. I'm here for you and if I can do anything, just let me know. Is there anything that's helping you cope? 【Susie the Pet】Session Date: August 01, 2023. At 09:26 AM, Jolene said, "Your support means a lot," and that Susie really helps when times get tough; pets have been great company, and video games have also been a nice distraction; an image shared by Jolene shows a photo of a man holding a snake on his arm. Deborah responded that they can provide love and comfort, especially during tough times, and asked how Jolene came to have Susie. Jolene replied that she adopted Susie two years ago when she was feeling lonely and wanted some company. Deborah added that animals can bring happiness, understand us, provide comfort, and that having a pet teaches us responsibility; she said Susie came at the perfect time and urged to cherish those moments with her and find strength in her presence. Jolene concluded that having Susie around shows she can stay strong and find joy in the small stuff.

【Jolene】On September 06, 2023 at 08:31 PM, Deborah asked Jolene how the project was going; Jolene replied that it was tough but she was chugging along. Deborah praised Jolene's strength for handling all the challenges and said, "You've got this." Jolene thanked Deborah, noting that her support meant a lot and that she would keep pushing forward. Deborah said she was here if Jolene needed her and urged Jolene to take care and rest. 【Deborah】Session Date: September 06, 2023; at 08:31 PM, Jolene asked Deborah: "What have you been doing lately?"

【Deborah's Father】January 27, 2023, 09:49 AM: Deborah told Jolene that her dad passed away two days ago; the sudden death left the family shell-shocked, and she is channeling grief by spending more time with family and cherishing the memories, these moments reminding her to live life fully; an image shared by Deborah shows a photo of a woman hugging a woman who is sitting on a couch. At 09:11 AM on August 21, 2023, Jolene asked whether they were mostly happy or a bit of everything. Deborah answered that happiness comes from taking it slow, seeing beauty in them, and finding joy. Jolene noted that they should take time to enjoy that and not let the business of life cause them to miss out on the good stuff. Deborah stated that life can be so busy that they often overlook the small things that truly matter and that they should make an effort to appreciate them more. Jolene added that slowing down and enjoying simple moments can bring a lot of balance and happiness; she is trying to do more yoga and meditation to help relax and stay focused, and asked whether Deborah practices calming habits to feel balanced. Deborah replied that yoga and meditation help her find balance and inner peace; going out for walks and staying mindful also keep her grounded; she takes similar photos on walks. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]. Jolene described the sunset photo as gorgeous and that going for a walk and feeling peaceful must be amazing. Jolene added that the calm and peaceful feeling is nice for recharging and thinking. Deborah said it's like a reboot for me. Jolene said it's like hitting the refresh button and coming back even better. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a green cushion on a floor in front of a window]. Deborah asked what is your favorite yoga pose for rest. Jolene replied that she is a fan of savasana, aka the corpse pose, which is calming and helps her let go and surrender. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a person laying on the floor with a paper bag]. Deborah commented that the photo is funny and asked how long Jolene has been doing yoga. Jolene replied that she has been doing it for 3 years, and that it is a great way to escape studying and work stress. Deborah responded that taking time to unwind is key and that that seems just right for Jolene. Jolene concluded that she is really finding her zen again. 【Jolene's Support】Jolene's Support, Session Date: August 21, 2023. On August 21, 2023, at 09:11 AM, Deborah said "Keep it up!"; Jolene said "Thanks for your support, Deb!"; Deborah said "Good luck with everything. Stay in touch."

【Deborah's Routine】Session Date: February 25, 2023. At 04:50 PM, Jolene asked Deborah what her daily routine looks like. Deborah stated that in the morning she meditates, does yoga, and teaches classes; yesterday she went for a morning jog for the first time in a nearby park and will now incorporate this into her daily routine; in the evenings she spends time with loved ones. Jolene asked why she decided that; Deborah replied, Exercise is key for me - it makes me feel connected to my body. Jolene commented, This is a great healthy habit! Deborah added, It's like they say - "Can't pour from an empty cup." Looking out for ourselves gives us the energy to help others. And don't forget, you're worth it too! Jolene concluded, Thanks, Deb. Your words really mean something to me. I'll keep remembering to prioritize self-care.

【Deborah-Meditation】On August 12, 2023, at 08:50 PM, Deborah stated that she had made a meditation guide for her yoga retreat and asked how Jolene was doing, adding that meditation can provide peace and calm in times like that and offering support, saying we're in this together. Jolene replied that she had been stressed since losing her work files and was overwhelmed, but meditation kept her calm and restored her clarity, and she appreciated the practice. Jolene also expressed appreciation for the support and shared an image: a photo of two notebooks with a blue cover and a white strip. 【Jolene-Notebooks】On August 12, 2023 at 08:50 PM, Deborah said, "Your creativity is amazing!" Jolene replied at 08:50 PM, "Thanks, Deb! I was inspired by my love for space and engines, so I designed these notebooks with elements like galaxies and circuitry, and I think they turned out really cool." Deborah said, "You have such a knack for turning these into art. They make me feel excited just by looking at them. Your creativity is amazing! Does that usually inspire your engineering projects too?" Jolene said, "Seeing art and design in various things gives me a unique perspective on problems." Deborah asked, "Got any neat projects or ideas you're pumped about?"

Deborah states that she runs and practices yoga/meditation with others, values connecting with people and building a community, and loves organizing workshops and events to practice mindfulness and self-care, viewing them as an effective way to have fun, build relationships, and support each other's growth. An image shared by Deborah shows a group of people doing yoga in a park. Jolene asks what the workshops and events involve. Deborah replies that they involve activities such as yoga, meditation, and self-reflection, with the aims of cultivating self-awareness, promoting mental and emotional well-being, and helping individuals find inner peace; they provide a space for people to connect, explore, and grow.

My mom stressed the value of helping others, and I want to keep that in mind for my engineering projects.

Jolene: In the future, I'm aiming to work on projects that make a real difference to communities. I'm interested in sustainable initiatives and developing innovative solutions for environmental issues. I also want to get involved with organizations that focus on social causes, using my skills to help out. It's about connecting my passion for engineering with my commitment to making a positive impact.

Deborah: You've got a lot of amazing plans for the future. Which projects are you most interested in getting involved in?

Jolene: I'm keen on two projects in particular. One is focused on developing renewable energy, like solar, to help communities and reduce dependence on non-renewables. The other is finding ways to supply clean water to those with limited access. Both align with my beliefs about sustainability and assisting those in need. I still have so much to figure out before beginning, but I'm up for the challenge.

We'll work it out. Take care of yourself, OK?" She added: "I'm here for you if you need me. Let's catch up soon."

At 05:35 PM, Jolene states she is using the Pomodoro Technique—25 minutes work, 5-minute break—to avoid burnout but remains unable to prioritize and asks for other time-management tips. Deborah states she creates a daily schedule or to-do list and shares an example for today, with an image of a notepad listing tasks. At 05:35 PM, Jolene adds that a big stack of tasks is overwhelming and provides an example from last Friday, with an image of a notepad with notes on it on a counter. 【Eisenhower Matrix】On March 22, 2023, at 05:35 PM, Deborah said that when overloaded she uses a method to determine what's important and urgent so she stays organized and asked Jolene if she knew about it. Jolene replied that she wasn't familiar with it and asked what it was about. Deborah offered to explain, saying it helps organize things based on how important and urgent they are. Jolene asked for more details, and Deborah stated that the Eisenhower Matrix sorts tasks into four boxes, categorizing them based on their urgency and importance, and that it can be really useful for organizing and prioritizing; she shared an image: a photo of a pair of scissors sitting on top of a piece of paper. Jolene said the visualization was helpful and thanked her. Deborah replied that she was glad it was helpful and proposed they try it to see if it helps Jolene stay focused and less stressed. Jolene agreed to give it a try, saying "Fingers crossed it'll help me," and thanked Deborah.

[March 02, 2023, 07:18 PM] Jolene states that one of her favorite dishes is lasagna; comfort food can be a great pick-me-up; she has a lot going on with her studies and exams. 【Deborah & Jolene: Wellbeing & Outdoors】On March 02, 2023, at 07:18 PM, Deborah asked Jolene if she had been able to find time for herself lately. Jolene said it’s amazing how a few quiet moments can work wonders for the soul. Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a purse with a plant on a table. Deborah then asked if Jolene had been able to get outside lately. Jolene replied that she did take Seraphim to the park last Sunday; she loved it and here’s a pic. Jolene stated that she needs to be more mindful of her stress levels and take care of her mental health, noting that sometimes she gets too caught up in her studies and forgets to prioritize self-care. Just look at my to-do list! It seems never-ending... Trying my best but it's been challenging." Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a desk with a notebook and a computer monitor. For time management, planners or schedulers help you stay organized and give you time for yourself. Let me know if you need help with a study plan!" Jolene: "I appreciate your help with that." Deborah: "Take care and good luck with your exams. I'll give you a mug just like this one! It encourages." Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a yellow coffee cup with a handwritten message. Jolene: "Thanks, Deb! This really cheered me up. All the best with your classes." Deborah: "Glad I could bring a smile to your face. Take care and make sure to give yourself some time to relax."

[September 17, 2023, 01:24 PM] Deborah: Can't wait; asks what day works and expresses excitement.
[September 17, 2023, 01:24 PM] Jolene: Proposes planning for next month; will check her schedule and let Deb know.

【Yoga in the Park】Yoga in the Park — Session Date: February 01, 2023. On February 01, 2023, at 07:03 PM, Jolene asked Deborah how they met. Deborah replied: It happened at yoga in the park. Jolene asked whether they talked about it. Deborah replied: Yeah, we talked about how it has improved our lives and the sense of community it gives. 【Jolene & Deborah Chat】Session Date: February 01, 2023. At 07:03 PM, Deborah met her new neighbor Anna yesterday and shared an image: a yellow sign with a picture of a family. Jolene shared an image: a purse with a plant on a table. Deborah asked whether Jolene had considered resuming yoga. Jolene stated that they planned to play the console with her partner. Deborah noted that it is good to have something to do together. Deborah then had to run.

【Deborah-Jolene Catch-Up】Session Date: March 13, 2023. At 11:22 AM, Deborah stated that they hadn't corresponded for a long time; Jolene replied that life can get chaotic and asked how it had been going lately; Deborah asked what's up, stated she was listening, and that they'll figure it out. 【Yoga Class & Community】On March 13, 2023, at 11:22 AM, Deborah stated that she started a yoga class in the neighborhood and hosted a class for neighbors on Friday; it was great to see everyone embrace and enjoy it, and she shared a photo of a group of women posing for a picture. Jolene congratulated her and asked how she did this. Deborah said she finds yoga calming and wanted to share that with others, and that giving people peace and awareness brings her happiness. Jolene noted that it's awesome to share something we love and make things better for others. Deborah added that teaching yoga is awesome because it can help others and that she has made such great friends through it, and that it is nice for building community connections. 【Support in Tough Times】Session date: March 13, 2023. At 11:22 AM, Jolene stated that having support in tough times is motivating and that it's great to have support; having someone to rely on is key in tough times and makes a difference in how we handle life, and she added that there is something she wanted to tell you. Deborah stated that support is one of life's best parts.

7.mflow_response: She lives close to the beach.

7.question: What ways do Deborah and Jolene use to enhance their yoga practice?

memories.memory:
【Bali】2023年2月22日 下午4:12，Jolene问Deborah：看起来是一次很棒的旅程！除了 Bali，你还去过哪些地方？同日同时间，Deborah回答：我去过几个地方，去年 Bali 是我其中一个最喜欢的地方。它是一座美丽的岛屿，给我带来平静，适合瑜伽；并附有 Deborah 分享的一张照片，照片显示海滩上的秋千与蓝天。随后，Jolene 表示若她决定去那里，会通知对方。Deborah：Take care！
[February 22, 2023, 04:12 PM] Jolene: Wow, looks lik 【Beach Yoga (Jolene & Deborah)】[Beach Yoga (Jolene & Deborah)]
[Session Date: February 22, 2023]

On February 22, 2023, at 04:12 PM, Jolene asked whether yoga on the beach is a thing and expressed a desire to try it. Deborah said the sound of the waves and the fresh air is wonderful. Jolene would definitely give it a go, noting it sounds peaceful. Deborah said to let her know how it goes and to enjoy it.

【Yoga & Self-Care】Yoga & Self-Care session; Session Date: August 01, 2023. At 09:26 AM, Deborah stated that enjoying the little things is key, that those little moments can give us a boost and push us forward, and asked Jolene how she has been taking care of herself lately. Jolene replied that she is trying to prioritize self-care, like yoga and meditation, which helps her stay balanced and grounded. Deborah offered to suggest some routines for Jolene to try. Jolene said she is always on the lookout for new routines to mix things up. Deborah suggested checking out this great place for yoga, with an image shared by Deborah: a photo of a room with a lot of yoga mats on the floor. Jolene noted that the room looks perfect for it and asked if Deborah has any favorite routines she can share. Deborah described one of her favorite yoga routines as a gentle flow that's all about breathing and grounding that helps her find her chill, and said she would send a tutorial video with the poses; this is me in the process :) [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a woman in a pink shirt doing a yoga pose]. Jolene asked whether that would help her find her chill or improve concentration. Deborah stated that it’s a great way to find balance in tough times and encouraged Jolene to try it out and let her know what she thinks. 【Chat Closure】On August 01, 2023, at 09:26 AM, Jolene stated she can't wait to try it out and that she will practice and update Deborah; Deborah said, "Let me know how it goes"; Jolene added that she would practice and update.

【Jolene Internship】Session Date: June 06, 2023. On June 06, 2023, at 03:56 PM, Deborah asked Jolene what she planned next after reaching this big milestone. Jolene replied that she is interning at a well-known engineering firm, a great opportunity to test her skills and gain real-world experience, and she added, "These are my new colleagues!" Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a group of construction workers posing for a picture. Deborah asked what's been the best part of it so far; Jolene said the best part has been being able to apply what she learned in school to real projects and seeing her ideas come to life. Deborah asked how the internship has impacted her; Jolene said it has had a positive impact on her life, stoking her love of engineering and encouraging her to keep striving for her dreams. Deborah asked how it inspired her to keep striving for her dreams; Jolene said Hanging out with people who love what they do has really inspired me to stay focused and keep working towards my goals. It's shown me that with dedication and effort, anything is possible. 【Work-Life Balance】June 06, 2023, 03:56 PM: Deborah asked Jolene whether she has been able to find a good work-life balance during her internship; Jolene said that finding that balance has been tough, that she has been slogging away, and that it has been hard to make time for her hobbies and chilling out. 【Yoga & Mindfulness】On June 06, 2023, at 03:56 PM, Deborah suggested taking breaks and activities like yoga to relax and unwind, stating it might make a difference. Jolene replied at 03:56 PM that she was trying to do it and gave an example of yesterday morning: yoga on top of mount Talkeetna, with an image shared by Jolene showing a man standing on a rock with his arms outstretched. Deborah responded at 03:56 PM with encouragement and asked how long Jolene had been doing yoga and meditation, noting it looked like it was helping her regroup and recharge. Jolene stated at 03:56 PM that she had been doing them sporadically for about 3 years and they've had a real positive effect. Deborah asked at 03:56 PM whether it had benefited her in any way and if she had found it helpful in difficult moments. Jolene answered at 03:56 PM that it had helped with stress and kept her centered. Deborah expressed at 03:56 PM that she was glad they'd been helpful. Jolene then said at 03:56 PM that she had no idea how she would have survived without them. Deborah described at 03:56 PM her favorite studio as calming, including an image shared by Deborah of a room with a bench and a window. Jolene asked at 03:56 PM for advice on calming the mind and breathing during yoga. Deborah recommended mindful breathing for yoga, stating to set aside a few minutes each day to sit with eyes closed, take deep breaths, and focus on how the air feels entering and leaving the body. Jolene thanked Deborah at 03:56 PM and said she would definitely give it a try, appreciating the advice. 【Farewell】June 06, 2023, 03:56 PM: Deborah offered further tips or help, stating, 'If you need more tips or help, just let me know.' Jolene spoke at the same timestamp.

【Deborah's Mom】On August 21, 2023 at 09:11 AM, Deborah went to a place that held a lot of memories, sat on a bench where they used to chat, and felt nostalgia, longing, and gratitude; she brought flowers there and shared images: a photo of a flower cart on a sidewalk with flowers in it and a photo of a vase of flowers on the ground in a street. She remarked that it’s amazing how a place can mean so much. Jolene then asked whether Deborah’s mother would like it. Deborah replied that her mom really loved flowers; they always made her happy; she appreciated the simple things in life. An image shared by Deborah shows a woman holding a bouquet of red roses. Jolene commented, “Wow, that’s a great photo! How did she show you to appreciate it?” Deborah concluded, “Moments like that I’ll always cherish.” 【Yoga and Mindfulness】Yoga and Mindfulness — Session Date: August 21, 2023. At 09:11 AM on August 21, 2023, Jolene asked whether they were mostly happy or a bit of everything. Deborah answered that happiness comes from taking it slow, seeing beauty in them, and finding joy. Jolene noted that they should take time to enjoy that and not let the business of life cause them to miss out on the good stuff. Deborah stated that life can be so busy that they often overlook the small things that truly matter and that they should make an effort to appreciate them more. Jolene added that slowing down and enjoying simple moments can bring a lot of balance and happiness; she is trying to do more yoga and meditation to help relax and stay focused, and asked whether Deborah practices calming habits to feel balanced. Deborah replied that yoga and meditation help her find balance and inner peace; going out for walks and staying mindful also keep her grounded; she takes similar photos on walks. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]. Jolene described the sunset photo as gorgeous and that going for a walk and feeling peaceful must be amazing. Jolene added that the calm and peaceful feeling is nice for recharging and thinking. Deborah said it's like a reboot for me. Jolene said it's like hitting the refresh button and coming back even better. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a green cushion on a floor in front of a window]. Deborah asked what is your favorite yoga pose for rest. Jolene replied that she is a fan of savasana, aka the corpse pose, which is calming and helps her let go and surrender. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a person laying on the floor with a paper bag]. Deborah commented that the photo is funny and asked how long Jolene has been doing yoga. Jolene replied that she has been doing it for 3 years, and that it is a great way to escape studying and work stress. Deborah responded that taking time to unwind is key and that that seems just right for Jolene. Jolene concluded that she is really finding her zen again. 【Jolene's Support】Jolene's Support, Session Date: August 21, 2023. On August 21, 2023, at 09:11 AM, Deborah said "Keep it up!"; Jolene said "Thanks for your support, Deb!"; Deborah said "Good luck with everything. Stay in touch."

【Yoga in the Park】Yoga in the Park — Session Date: February 01, 2023. On February 01, 2023, at 07:03 PM, Jolene asked Deborah how they met. Deborah replied: It happened at yoga in the park. Jolene asked whether they talked about it. Deborah replied: Yeah, we talked about how it has improved our lives and the sense of community it gives. 【Jolene & Deborah Chat】Session Date: February 01, 2023. At 07:03 PM, Deborah met her new neighbor Anna yesterday and shared an image: a yellow sign with a picture of a family. Jolene shared an image: a purse with a plant on a table. Deborah asked whether Jolene had considered resuming yoga. Jolene stated that they planned to play the console with her partner. Deborah noted that it is good to have something to do together. Deborah then had to run.

【Warrior II Practice】February 04, 2023, 09:48 AM，Deborah 表示：“当事情变得困难时，只需深呼吸，记住你为何在做这件事。”这是她花大量时间在此处教授瑜伽的原因，这是找到平衡、重新与自己连接的好方式；她还提到在昨天的 l yoga class 上与 Anna 建立了联系。Deborah 分享的图片显示两名女性在舞蹈工作室做舞蹈姿势。  
February 04, 2023, 09:48 AM，Jolene 表示：“哇，太棒了！你尝试了哪些新姿势？”  
February 04, 2023, 09:48 AM，Deborah 回应：“我们在尝试不同的舞蹈姿势，例如 Warrior II，它能增强力量并提升专注力。” Debora h 分享的图片显示一名女子在椅子上做瑜伽姿势。 【Anna and Support】Session Date: February 04, 2023. At 09:48 AM, Jolene asked, "Is it difficult to do?" Deborah replied, "Yes, but this brought us closer to Anna! We supported each other, that means a lot." 【Chair Twist Instruction】Session Date: February 04, 2023. At 09:48 AM, Jolene asked, "Can you explain how to do it?" Deborah answered, "Sure! To do this modified pose, sit on the edge of a chair with your feet planted, twist your torso to one side and use your hand on your knee for support, you'll feel a stretch in your back and shoulders as you hold it for a few breaths, then switch sides. It's great for relaxing tense muscles."

【Deborah-Jolene Catch-Up】Session Date: March 13, 2023. At 11:22 AM, Deborah stated that they hadn't corresponded for a long time; Jolene replied that life can get chaotic and asked how it had been going lately; Deborah asked what's up, stated she was listening, and that they'll figure it out. 【Yoga Class & Community】On March 13, 2023, at 11:22 AM, Deborah stated that she started a yoga class in the neighborhood and hosted a class for neighbors on Friday; it was great to see everyone embrace and enjoy it, and she shared a photo of a group of women posing for a picture. Jolene congratulated her and asked how she did this. Deborah said she finds yoga calming and wanted to share that with others, and that giving people peace and awareness brings her happiness. Jolene noted that it's awesome to share something we love and make things better for others. Deborah added that teaching yoga is awesome because it can help others and that she has made such great friends through it, and that it is nice for building community connections. 【Support in Tough Times】Session date: March 13, 2023. At 11:22 AM, Jolene stated that having support in tough times is motivating and that it's great to have support; having someone to rely on is key in tough times and makes a difference in how we handle life, and she added that there is something she wanted to tell you. Deborah stated that support is one of life's best parts.

【Yoga Atmosphere】[Yoga Atmosphere]
[Session Date: March 28, 2023]

2023年3月28日16:03，Deborah表示购买了用于瑜伽课的新道具，图像显示一群人正在房间里做瑜伽；她还购买了用于营造氛围并提升瑜伽练习的蜡烛，另一张图像为桌上放置的带迷迭香的蜡烛。Jolene回应称在此活动中感到放松，喜欢用薰衣草与迷迭香等香氛营造宁静空间，并询问对方是否有偏爱的香气或仪式。Deborah补充称自己也热爱此类香氛，蜡烛与精油为瑜伽时提供温暖与平静，某些气味能将人带入平和之境，并询问是否还有其他提升瑜伽练习的方法。
[March 28, 2023, 04:03 PM] Deborah: You've really proven your ski 【Yoga Music】Yoga Music
Session Date: March 28, 2023.

At 04:03 PM Jolene stated that music helps her and asked for favorite tracks. Deborah replied that instrumental tracks with mellow melodies and rhythms help create a peaceful vibe, citing "Savana" as a favorite and asking what songs/artists Jolene likes listening to during practice. Jolene replied that she loves listening to Nils Frahm and Olafur Arnalds during practice, finding their music calming and putting her in a different headspace, and asked for recommendations of other similar artists or tracks. Deborah said she is listening to an album called 'Sleep,' which is great for meditation and deep relaxation, and hopes Jolene finds it as calming as she does. Jolene said she will check them out, noting that it's always good to have some new tunes for yoga. Deborah added: Let me know your thoughts on the albums. 【Closing】Session Date: March 28, 2023. At 04:03 PM on March 28, 2023, Deborah said, 'Take care and keep up the good work!'

【Deborah's Routine】Session Date: February 25, 2023. At 04:50 PM, Jolene asked Deborah what her daily routine looks like. Deborah stated that in the morning she meditates, does yoga, and teaches classes; yesterday she went for a morning jog for the first time in a nearby park and will now incorporate this into her daily routine; in the evenings she spends time with loved ones. Jolene asked why she decided that; Deborah replied, Exercise is key for me - it makes me feel connected to my body. Jolene commented, This is a great healthy habit! Deborah added, It's like they say - "Can't pour from an empty cup." Looking out for ourselves gives us the energy to help others. And don't forget, you're worth it too! Jolene concluded, Thanks, Deb. Your words really mean something to me. I'll keep remembering to prioritize self-care.

【Deborah-Meditation】On August 12, 2023, at 08:50 PM, Deborah stated that she had made a meditation guide for her yoga retreat and asked how Jolene was doing, adding that meditation can provide peace and calm in times like that and offering support, saying we're in this together. Jolene replied that she had been stressed since losing her work files and was overwhelmed, but meditation kept her calm and restored her clarity, and she appreciated the practice. Jolene also expressed appreciation for the support and shared an image: a photo of two notebooks with a blue cover and a white strip. 【Jolene-Notebooks】On August 12, 2023 at 08:50 PM, Deborah said, "Your creativity is amazing!" Jolene replied at 08:50 PM, "Thanks, Deb! I was inspired by my love for space and engines, so I designed these notebooks with elements like galaxies and circuitry, and I think they turned out really cool." Deborah said, "You have such a knack for turning these into art. They make me feel excited just by looking at them. Your creativity is amazing! Does that usually inspire your engineering projects too?" Jolene said, "Seeing art and design in various things gives me a unique perspective on problems." Deborah asked, "Got any neat projects or ideas you're pumped about?"

7.mflow_response: Aromatherapy, music, props, breathing, outdoor locations, meditation

7.question: What music pieces does Deborah listen to during her yoga practice?

She remarked that it’s amazing how a place can mean so much. Jolene then asked whether Deborah’s mother would like it. Deborah replied that her mom really loved flowers; they always made her happy; she appreciated the simple things in life. An image shared by Deborah shows a woman holding a bouquet of red roses. Jolene commented, “Wow, that’s a great photo! How did she show you to appreciate it?” Deborah concluded, “Moments like that I’ll always cherish.” 【Yoga and Mindfulness】Yoga and Mindfulness — Session Date: August 21, 2023. Jolene noted that they should take time to enjoy that and not let the business of life cause them to miss out on the good stuff. Deborah stated that life can be so busy that they often overlook the small things that truly matter and that they should make an effort to appreciate them more. Jolene added that slowing down and enjoying simple moments can bring a lot of balance and happiness; she is trying to do more yoga and meditation to help relax and stay focused, and asked whether Deborah practices calming habits to feel balanced. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]. Jolene described the sunset photo as gorgeous and that going for a walk and feeling peaceful must be amazing. Jolene said it's like hitting the refresh button and coming back even better. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a green cushion on a floor in front of a window]. Deborah asked what is your favorite yoga pose for rest. Jolene replied that she is a fan of savasana, aka the corpse pose, which is calming and helps her let go and surrender. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a person laying on the floor with a paper bag]. Deborah commented that the photo is funny and asked how long Jolene has been doing yoga. Jolene replied that she has been doing it for 3 years, and that it is a great way to escape studying and work stress. Deborah responded that taking time to unwind is key and that that seems just right for Jolene. Jolene concluded that she is really finding her zen again. 【Jolene's Support】Jolene's Support, Session Date: August 21, 2023. On August 21, 2023, at 09:11 AM, Deborah said "Keep it up!"; Jolene said "Thanks for your support, Deb!"; Deborah said "Good luck with everything. Stay in touch."

Deborah replied that the yoga pose looked great, that it must have been a cool experience for the two of them, and asked what the trip taught them. Jolene replied that they had a great time visiting an old temple and that the stairs were amazing. Deborah said that exploring those temples must have been incredible; three years ago she was also in Rio de Janeiro and took a beautiful photo on one of the excursions [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a large stone structure with a mountain in the background]. Jolene commented that the architecture and history were really interesting and that she was sure Deborah also liked the places they visited there. Deborah noted that exploring historical places and learning their stories is fun and was a great experience; she wanted to share this photo [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a hand holding a piece of paper with writing on it], and Jolene asked what was written on the paper in the photo. 【Personal Note and Quote】Session Date: August 30, 2023. At 11:46 AM, Jolene replied, apologizing, and said that it's a good reminder to stay focused and let go of what no longer serves us; she remembered the quote in her notebook, and it also inspires her; [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a notebook with a quote on it].

【Jolene goals】On August 24, 2023, at 09:34 AM, Jolene reported that life's been hectic but she's making strides toward her goals; it's tough, but satisfying. Jolene stated that her goal is to be successful in her field and make a positive impact; she has been studying, attending workshops, and networking to make it happen; she recently had the opportunity to present at a virtual conference and received positive feedback, a great experience that confirmed she is on the right track. 【Deborah encouragement】On August 24, 2023, at 09:34 AM, Deborah noted Jolene had put her heart and soul into it and asked how it felt when people gave positive feedback and what comes next. Your support means a lot to me." Deborah then encouraged continued progress. 【Jolene's journey】On August 24, 2023 at 09:34 AM, Jolene stated that she would not give up and would continue pushing forward; Deborah said to reach for goals and not forget to enjoy the journey; Jolene thanked Deborah, saying her support means a lot, and she will keep pushing forward and enjoy every step of the way; Deborah emphasized that the journey is as important as the destination, urged Jolene to take time for herself and find joy, and expressed belief in Jolene. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a city skyline at sunset with a body of water] Deborah stated she would always be by Jolene's side.

Deborah replied that the group members sent this to me; they thanked me for the positive influence I had on them; those moments remind me why I'm so passionate about yoga. 【Deborah's Mother】On January 27, 2023, 09:49 AM, Jolene asked Deborah where she most often does yoga. Jolene said it must be great to have that place where you feel connected to her. Deborah said yeah, it’s special; I can feel her presence when I sit there and it comforts me, and she shared an image of a window seat in a room with a window. Jolene said wow, it sounds like that spot holds a lot of sentimental value; does it bring back any special memories? Deborah said yeah, Jolene, she’d sit there every night with a book and a smile, reading was one of her hobbies, it was one of her favorite places in the house, and she shared an image of a view of the sky from an airplane window. Jolene asked what other hobbies did your mother have. Deborah answered Travel was also her great passion!

memories.memory: 【Deborah's Father】January 27, 2023, 09:49 AM: Deborah told Jolene that her dad passed away two days ago; the sudden death left the family shell-shocked, and she is channeling grief by spending more time with family and cherishing the memories, these moments reminding her to live life fully; an image shared by Deborah shows a photo of a woman hugging a woman who is sitting on a couch. Jolene expressed condolences and asked how it's going for Deborah and her family. Deborah replied that, even though it's hard, it's comforting to look back on the great memories; we looked at the family album; photos give me peace during difficult times; this is my parents' wedding in 1993; an image shared by Deborah shows a photo of a bride and groom posing for a picture. Jolene said they were a beautiful couple. Deborah stated that her husband and she are trying to be as good a family as her parents were. Jolene asked what you value in your relationship. Deborah answered that it is love, and openness that have kept us close all these years; being there for each other has made us both happy; look what letter I received yesterday; an image shared by Deborah shows a note written to someone on a piece of paper. Jolene asked who this letter is from. Deborah replied that the group members sent this to me; they thanked me for the positive influence I had on them; those moments remind me why I'm so passionate about yoga. 【Deborah's Mother】On January 27, 2023, 09:49 AM, Jolene asked Deborah where she most often does yoga. Deborah replied that this is one of the places where she does it, and she shared an image: a photo of a living room with a television and a window. Jolene asked where it is. Deborah said that’s my old home; I go there now and then for my mom, who passed away, and sitting in that spot by the window gives me peace. Jolene said it must be great to have that place where you feel connected to her. Deborah said yeah, it’s special; I can feel her presence when I sit there and it comforts me, and she shared an image of a window seat in a room with a window. Jolene said wow, it sounds like that spot holds a lot of sentimental value; does it bring back any special memories? Deborah said yeah, Jolene, she’d sit there every night with a book and a smile, reading was one of her hobbies, it was one of her favorite places in the house, and she shared an image of a view of the sky from an airplane window. Jolene asked what other hobbies did your mother have. Deborah answered Travel was also her great passion!

【Jolene】On September 06, 2023 at 08:31 PM, Deborah asked Jolene how the project was going; Jolene replied that it was tough but she was chugging along. Deborah praised Jolene's strength for handling all the challenges and said, "You've got this." Jolene thanked Deborah, noting that her support meant a lot and that she would keep pushing forward. Deborah said she was here if Jolene needed her and urged Jolene to take care and rest. 【Deborah】Session Date: September 06, 2023; at 08:31 PM, Jolene asked Deborah: "What have you been doing lately?"

【Sunrise with Jolene】Sunrise with Jolene. Session Date: September 06, 2023. On September 06, 2023, at 08:31 PM, Deborah stated: "An offer I can't refuse!" 【Farewell Between Jolene and Deborah】Session Date: September 06, 2023. At 08:31 PM, Jolene bid farewell to Deborah with "Bye, Deb! See you later!" and Deborah responded at 08:31 PM with "See ya! Stay safe and catch you later. Bye!"

【Jolene goals】On August 24, 2023, at 09:34 AM, Jolene reported that life's been hectic but she's making strides toward her goals; it's tough, but satisfying. Deborah asked Jolene to tell more about it and what she has achieved. Jolene stated that her goal is to be successful in her field and make a positive impact; she has been studying, attending workshops, and networking to make it happen; she recently had the opportunity to present at a virtual conference and received positive feedback, a great experience that confirmed she is on the right track. 【Deborah encouragement】On August 24, 2023, at 09:34 AM, Deborah noted Jolene had put her heart and soul into it and asked how it felt when people gave positive feedback and what comes next. Jolene replied that she was thrilled by the positive feedback and that it felt rewarding that her efforts were appreciated; she is currently focusing on studying and gaining more experience, is considering more internships to further enhance her skills, and hopes for more updates to share soon. Deborah expressed pride in Jolene's achievements, offered help, and said, "Let me know if you need any help" and "No problem. You got this." Jolene replied, "Thanks, Deb! Your support means a lot to me." Deborah then encouraged continued progress. 【Jolene's journey】On August 24, 2023 at 09:34 AM, Jolene stated that she would not give up and would continue pushing forward; Deborah said to reach for goals and not forget to enjoy the journey; Jolene thanked Deborah, saying her support means a lot, and she will keep pushing forward and enjoy every step of the way; Deborah emphasized that the journey is as important as the destination, urged Jolene to take time for herself and find joy, and expressed belief in Jolene. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a field of sunflowers with a sunset in the background] Jolene confirmed she would follow the advice and find joy along the way, thanking Deborah for the support. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a city skyline at sunset with a body of water] Deborah stated she would always be by Jolene's side.

【Jolene's Project】On April 09, 2023 at 04:30 PM, Jolene stated: "Just so you know, I've been working on a big project lately - it's been tough but also really cool to watch it take shape. Can't wait to see the final result!" Deborah said: "I am waiting to hear how everything turns out. Keep up the good work!" Jolene replied: "Thanks Deb! Your support means a lot. I'll keep you updated on the progress of the project." 【Deborah Support】[April 09, 2023, 04:30 PM] Deborah stated that her support means a lot to Jolene and that she will always be there for Jolene; she also instructed Jolene to make time for the things that bring her joy. [April 09, 2023, 04:30 PM] Jolene stated that she will make sure to find time for that.

【Bouquet Backstory】Session Date: February 04, 2023. At 09:48 AM on February 04, 2023, Deborah sent: "That's a really powerful message. It reminds me of someone special and their grace and strength when they faced hardships. Check out this creation! [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a bouquet of flowers in a vase on a table]"; Jolene asked: "Wow, Deb! That's beautiful! Can you tell me the backstory of that bouquet?"; Deborah replied: "My friend gave me this bouquet when I was struggling, and it gives me hope and courage. I'm filled with warmth and appreciation when I look at it." Jolene responded: "That's really sweet. Such a small thing can make a real difference." Deborah concluded: "It's amazing how something as simple as flowers can make a real difference. Nature sure is beautiful." 【Bogota & Nature】Session Date: February 04, 2023. At 09:48 AM Jolene asked, Where are some of your favorite nature spots? Deborah cited two favorites: a park with a forest trail, which she finds calming, and a nearby beach, where the sound of the waves and the sand underfoot make her feel peaceful and happy. Jolene responded with a photo she took on vacation last summer in Bogota, noting that watching the sunset over the water was beautiful and calming and that it made her appreciate nature's calming power; Jolene's image shows a person walking on the beach with a surfboard. Deborah replied that nature is calming and helps forget daily craziness and find inner peace, and that she likes to come to a spot by the water near her mom's old house where she reflects on her mom's life; being surrounded by nature helps a lot. Deborah's image shows a small island with a lone boat in the water. 【Mom's Memory & Keepsakes】[妈妈的记忆与纪念品]
[会话日期：2023年2月4日]

2023年2月4日 09:48，Jolene：这太感人了！你在来回想起母亲时，是否有什么小传统？
2023年2月4日 09:48，Deborah：你还记得她送的护身符吗？每次我来这里，我都带着它。这是我感受她的爱、保持与她同在的方式。握着它会让我感到安慰。图片描述：一位穿白色衬衫、佩戴金项链的女性。
2023年2月4日 09:48，Jolene：小物件也能产生如此大的影响。
2023年2月4日 09:48，Deborah：是的，这样的小东西也能带来巨大差异。它提醒我们内在的爱与力量，连接我们与已离去的亲人，并给予安慰。
2023年2月4日 09:48，Jolene：它能让他们每天留在我们心中。
2023年2月4日 09:48，Deborah：Anna也有一条吊坠，在记念她的母亲时佩戴！这也让我们更亲近。
2023年2月4日 09:48，Jolene：拥有这些提醒作为需要时的力量来源，确实很好。 【Deborah & Jolene Farewell】On February 04, 2023 at 09:48 AM, Deborah told Jolene that life is tough but to hang in there, advised looking to sources of strength to do great, and urged staying in touch and taking care of oneself, adding that she is always there to cheer her on. Jolene responded at 09:48 AM that Deborah's encouragement means a lot and that she will definitely stay in touch.

【Karlie grief coping】2023-02-22 04:12 PM，Deborah 表示玫瑰和大丽花给她带来安宁，上周她失去了一位朋友，因此一直在花园里寻求安慰。Jolene 表示遗憾并问她近况。Deborah 回应，感谢对方的善意，称这段时间很艰难，但通过回忆他们在一起的时光获得安慰，这让她意识到生活有多么宝贵。Jolene 表示记忆可以带来很大的安慰和喜悦。
[February 22, 2023, 04:12 PM] Deborah: The roses and 【Karlie last photo】Session Date: February 22, 2023. February 22, 2023, 04:12 PM: Deborah posted, "Memories keep our loved ones close. This is the last photo with Karlie which was taken last summer when we hiked. It was our last one. We had such a great time! Every time I see it, I can't help but smile." An image shared by Deborah shows two women riding on a motorcycle on a dirt road.

【Deborah's Mom】On August 21, 2023 at 09:11 AM, Deborah went to a place that held a lot of memories, sat on a bench where they used to chat, and felt nostalgia, longing, and gratitude; she brought flowers there and shared images: a photo of a flower cart on a sidewalk with flowers in it and a photo of a vase of flowers on the ground in a street. She remarked that it’s amazing how a place can mean so much. Jolene then asked whether Deborah’s mother would like it. Deborah replied that her mom really loved flowers; they always made her happy; she appreciated the simple things in life. An image shared by Deborah shows a woman holding a bouquet of red roses. Jolene commented, “Wow, that’s a great photo! How did she show you to appreciate it?” Deborah concluded, “Moments like that I’ll always cherish.” 【Yoga and Mindfulness】Yoga and Mindfulness — Session Date: August 21, 2023. At 09:11 AM on August 21, 2023, Jolene asked whether they were mostly happy or a bit of everything. Deborah answered that happiness comes from taking it slow, seeing beauty in them, and finding joy. Jolene noted that they should take time to enjoy that and not let the business of life cause them to miss out on the good stuff. Deborah stated that life can be so busy that they often overlook the small things that truly matter and that they should make an effort to appreciate them more. Jolene added that slowing down and enjoying simple moments can bring a lot of balance and happiness; she is trying to do more yoga and meditation to help relax and stay focused, and asked whether Deborah practices calming habits to feel balanced. Deborah replied that yoga and meditation help her find balance and inner peace; going out for walks and staying mindful also keep her grounded; she takes similar photos on walks. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]. Jolene described the sunset photo as gorgeous and that going for a walk and feeling peaceful must be amazing. Jolene added that the calm and peaceful feeling is nice for recharging and thinking. Deborah said it's like a reboot for me. Jolene said it's like hitting the refresh button and coming back even better. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a green cushion on a floor in front of a window]. Deborah asked what is your favorite yoga pose for rest. Jolene replied that she is a fan of savasana, aka the corpse pose, which is calming and helps her let go and surrender. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a person laying on the floor with a paper bag]. Deborah commented that the photo is funny and asked how long Jolene has been doing yoga. Jolene replied that she has been doing it for 3 years, and that it is a great way to escape studying and work stress. Deborah responded that taking time to unwind is key and that that seems just right for Jolene. Jolene concluded that she is really finding her zen again. 【Jolene's Support】Jolene's Support, Session Date: August 21, 2023. On August 21, 2023, at 09:11 AM, Deborah said "Keep it up!"; Jolene said "Thanks for your support, Deb!"; Deborah said "Good luck with everything. Stay in touch."

【Deborah-Meditation】On August 12, 2023, at 08:50 PM, Deborah stated that she had made a meditation guide for her yoga retreat and asked how Jolene was doing, adding that meditation can provide peace and calm in times like that and offering support, saying we're in this together. Jolene replied that she had been stressed since losing her work files and was overwhelmed, but meditation kept her calm and restored her clarity, and she appreciated the practice. Jolene also expressed appreciation for the support and shared an image: a photo of two notebooks with a blue cover and a white strip. 【Jolene-Notebooks】On August 12, 2023 at 08:50 PM, Deborah said, "Your creativity is amazing!" Jolene replied at 08:50 PM, "Thanks, Deb! I was inspired by my love for space and engines, so I designed these notebooks with elements like galaxies and circuitry, and I think they turned out really cool." Deborah said, "You have such a knack for turning these into art. They make me feel excited just by looking at them. Your creativity is amazing! Does that usually inspire your engineering projects too?" Jolene said, "Seeing art and design in various things gives me a unique perspective on problems." Deborah asked, "Got any neat projects or ideas you're pumped about?"

At 11:22 AM, Deborah stated that they hadn't corresponded for a long time; Jolene replied that life can get chaotic and asked how it had been going lately; Deborah asked what's up, stated she was listening, and that they'll figure it out. 【Yoga Class & Community】On March 13, 2023, at 11:22 AM, Deborah stated that she started a yoga class in the neighborhood and hosted a class for neighbors on Friday; it was great to see everyone embrace and enjoy it, and she shared a photo of a group of women posing for a picture. Jolene congratulated her and asked how she did this. Deborah said she finds yoga calming and wanted to share that with others, and that giving people peace and awareness brings her happiness. Jolene noted that it's awesome to share something we love and make things better for others. Deborah added that teaching yoga is awesome because it can help others and that she has made such great friends through it, and that it is nice for building community connections. 【Support in Tough Times】Session date: March 13, 2023. Deborah stated that support is one of life's best parts.

【Mom】2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：自从我们谈过以后，我一直在思考我妈妈的影响，记住我们所爱的人很重要。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Jolene：我明白，Deb。记住并珍惜我们所爱之人的记忆非常重要。知道他们的影响仍在指引我们让人感到安慰。上周五，我和我的伴侣讨论了我们所爱之人对我们的影响以及他们的价值观对我们的意义。这是一次情感丰富的谈话，但它让我们感到更亲近，也让我们看清了真正重要的事物。

【Mom】2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：自从我们谈过以后，我一直在思考我妈妈的影响，记住我们所爱的人很重要。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Jolene：我明白，Deb。记住并珍惜我们所爱之人的记忆非常重要。知道他们的影响仍在指引我们让人感到安慰。上周五，我和我的伴侣讨论了我们所爱之人对我们的影响以及他们的价值观对我们的意义。这是一次情感丰富的谈话，但它让我们感到更亲近，也让我们看清了真正重要的事物。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：那些类型的对话真的有助于建立关系。你能告诉我他们赋予你们的价值观吗？

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Jolene：当然！我们的亲人教会我们坚持和韧性，比如我妈妈总是说永不放弃，我伴侣的父亲教他们保持决心。他们的价值观促使我们去追求目标，例如我从事工程学，我的伴侣从事创造性事业。即使他们不在这里，我们仍然感到他们的价值观在指引我们前进。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：听到这些真的很棒，Jolene！他们的价值观在你们身上继续指引着你们，尽管他们不在。听起来你和你的伴侣正通过追求各自的热情来纪念他们。你有没有考虑把这些价值观也融入到你的工作中？
[August 26, 2023, 05:33 PM] Deborah: Hey Jolene, s 【Jolene's Projects】[Jolene's Projects]
[Session Date: August 26, 2023]

At 05:33 PM on August 26, 2023, Jolene stated: We've been figuring out how to add these values into our projects. As an engineering student, I want to use my talents to do good and help solve important problems. I'm keen on coming up with new ideas and making things more efficient to make the world a better place. My mom stressed the value of helping others, and I want to keep that in mind for my engineering projects.

Deborah: When our work ties into our values, it becomes more meaningful. What goals or ideas do you have for incorporating those values into your future projects?

Jolene: In the future, I'm aiming to work on projects that make a real difference to communities. I'm interested in sustainable initiatives and developing innovative solutions for environmental issues. I also want to get involved with organizations that focus on social causes, using my skills to help out. It's about connecting my passion for engineering with my commitment to making a positive impact.

Deborah: You've got a lot of amazing plans for the future. Which projects are you most interested in getting involved in?

Jolene: I'm keen on two projects in particular. One is focused on developing renewable energy, like solar, to help communities and reduce dependence on non-renewables. The other is finding ways to supply clean water to those with limited access. Both align with my beliefs about sustainability and assisting those in need. I still have so much to figure out before beginning, but I'm up for the challenge.

【Jolene's Project】On April 09, 2023 at 04:30 PM, Jolene stated: "Just so you know, I've been working on a big project lately - it's been tough but also really cool to watch it take shape. Can't wait to see the final result!" Deborah said: "I am waiting to hear how everything turns out. Keep up the good work!" Jolene replied: "Thanks Deb! Your support means a lot. I'll keep you updated on the progress of the project." 【Deborah Support】[April 09, 2023, 04:30 PM] Deborah stated that her support means a lot to Jolene and that she will always be there for Jolene; she also instructed Jolene to make time for the things that bring her joy. [April 09, 2023, 04:30 PM] Jolene stated that she will make sure to find time for that.

【Jolene's Project】June 26, 2023, 09:17 AM: Jolene stated that things have been intense lately, she is pushing herself to succeed and sometimes feels overwhelmed, but she is determined to overcome obstacles and achieve her goals; Deborah advised to keep up the hard work and remember to relax; Jolene thanked Deborah and reported a big breakthrough with this project, describing it as exciting and rewarding, and she shared Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a drawing of a house with a ruler and a ruler; Deborah expressed that she is really glad the project worked out.

【Water Purifier Project】On February 04, 2023, at 09:48 AM, Jolene told Deborah she had been on an emotional rollercoaster lately but was coping. Deborah replied that all good here and asked if Jolene had anything new happening lately. Jolene said she had a major milestone last week that went really well, expressing relief and pride, and noting it was a huge accomplishment for her as an engineer. Deborah said that's awesome and asked to share more about it. Jolene added that she had to plan and research a lot to design and build a sustainable water purifier for a rural community in need; it was tough, but she loved the experience. Deborah remarked that Jolene's engineering skills really made a difference for people in a rural area and asked how it felt when she saw it working. Jolene responded that it was surreal; seeing it working and providing clean water to the community was incredibly satisfying, and it reminded her of how engineering can make a difference in people's lives, giving her a sense of purpose and the feeling that she had done something good. 【Jolene Career Path】Jolene Career Path. Session Date: February 04, 2023. On February 04, 2023, at 09:48 AM, Deborah asked Jolene about her career aspirations. Jolene stated she wants to keep working in engineering and continue to make a positive impact on communities in need by creating sustainable solutions, with the goal of contributing toward making the world a better place through her work. She added that she is determined to keep going and make a difference, and that Deborah's support means a lot and her encouragement motivates her to pursue her passions.

【Engineering Project Breakthrough】Session Date: March 28, 2023. At 04:03 PM on March 28, 2023, Jolene stated that on Friday she had a breakthrough with her engineering project, finally found a solution to a prob that's been bugging her, and she feels great to see her hard work paying off. An image shared by Jolene shows a hand holding a pair of scissors. 【Case Details and Image】Session Date: March 28, 2023. March 28, 2023, 04:03 PM: Jolene stated that she has new details for this case and asked to rate it; image shared by Jolene: a photo of a cardboard mat with a cup of coffee on it.

【Deborah's Mom】On August 21, 2023 at 09:11 AM, Deborah went to a place that held a lot of memories, sat on a bench where they used to chat, and felt nostalgia, longing, and gratitude; she brought flowers there and shared images: a photo of a flower cart on a sidewalk with flowers in it and a photo of a vase of flowers on the ground in a street. She remarked that it’s amazing how a place can mean so much. Jolene then asked whether Deborah’s mother would like it. Deborah replied that her mom really loved flowers; they always made her happy; she appreciated the simple things in life. An image shared by Deborah shows a woman holding a bouquet of red roses. Jolene commented, “Wow, that’s a great photo! How did she show you to appreciate it?” Deborah concluded, “Moments like that I’ll always cherish.” 【Yoga and Mindfulness】Yoga and Mindfulness — Session Date: August 21, 2023. At 09:11 AM on August 21, 2023, Jolene asked whether they were mostly happy or a bit of everything. Deborah answered that happiness comes from taking it slow, seeing beauty in them, and finding joy. Jolene noted that they should take time to enjoy that and not let the business of life cause them to miss out on the good stuff. Deborah stated that life can be so busy that they often overlook the small things that truly matter and that they should make an effort to appreciate them more. Jolene added that slowing down and enjoying simple moments can bring a lot of balance and happiness; she is trying to do more yoga and meditation to help relax and stay focused, and asked whether Deborah practices calming habits to feel balanced. Deborah replied that yoga and meditation help her find balance and inner peace; going out for walks and staying mindful also keep her grounded; she takes similar photos on walks. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]. Jolene described the sunset photo as gorgeous and that going for a walk and feeling peaceful must be amazing. Jolene added that the calm and peaceful feeling is nice for recharging and thinking. Deborah said it's like a reboot for me. Jolene said it's like hitting the refresh button and coming back even better. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a green cushion on a floor in front of a window]. Deborah asked what is your favorite yoga pose for rest. Jolene replied that she is a fan of savasana, aka the corpse pose, which is calming and helps her let go and surrender. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a person laying on the floor with a paper bag]. Deborah commented that the photo is funny and asked how long Jolene has been doing yoga. Jolene replied that she has been doing it for 3 years, and that it is a great way to escape studying and work stress. Deborah responded that taking time to unwind is key and that that seems just right for Jolene. Jolene concluded that she is really finding her zen again. 【Jolene's Support】Jolene's Support, Session Date: August 21, 2023. On August 21, 2023, at 09:11 AM, Deborah said "Keep it up!"; Jolene said "Thanks for your support, Deb!"; Deborah said "Good luck with everything. Stay in touch."

【Jolene】On September 06, 2023 at 08:31 PM, Deborah asked Jolene how the project was going; Jolene replied that it was tough but she was chugging along. Deborah praised Jolene's strength for handling all the challenges and said, "You've got this." Jolene thanked Deborah, noting that her support meant a lot and that she would keep pushing forward. Deborah said she was here if Jolene needed her and urged Jolene to take care and rest. 【Deborah】Session Date: September 06, 2023; at 08:31 PM, Jolene asked Deborah: "What have you been doing lately?"

【Engineering Project Wrap-Up】On June 06, 2023 at 03:56 PM, Jolene stated that she had finally wrapped up the tough engineering project last month and shared an image of a solar powered vehicle with a solar panel on the back. Deborah congratulated Jolene on wrapping up the project, noting that the work paid off. Jolene added that she was really proud of herself for sticking it out despite the problems and finishing it, calling it a big milestone.

【Wednesday Update】On February 09, 2023 at 09:03 PM, Jolene stated that last Wednesday she did a mini retreat to assess where she is in life; it was a dope experience that totally gave her a new outlook. Deborah asked whether she gained any new insights from it. Jolene said she achieved more than she imagined and that it was a real confidence boost. 【Engineering Project Details】February 09, 2023, 09:03 PM: Deborah acknowledged Jolene for stepping outside her comfort zone and believing in herself and asked what she accomplished at the retreat. Jolene stated that she really accomplished something with her engineering project, came up with some neat solutions, and was excited about it.

【Jolene's Community Project】On August 01, 2023, at 09:26 AM, Jolene told Debs that last week she had a huge setback with her project; she put in so much work and it all crashed and she lost everything, SO frustrating and depressing. Deborah replied: Jolene, sorry to hear that. It must be really tough. I'm here for you and if I can do anything, just let me know. Is there anything that's helping you cope? 【Susie the Pet】Session Date: August 01, 2023. At 09:26 AM, Jolene said, "Your support means a lot," and that Susie really helps when times get tough; pets have been great company, and video games have also been a nice distraction; an image shared by Jolene shows a photo of a man holding a snake on his arm. Deborah responded that they can provide love and comfort, especially during tough times, and asked how Jolene came to have Susie. Jolene replied that she adopted Susie two years ago when she was feeling lonely and wanted some company. Deborah added that animals can bring happiness, understand us, provide comfort, and that having a pet teaches us responsibility; she said Susie came at the perfect time and urged to cherish those moments with her and find strength in her presence. Jolene concluded that having Susie around shows she can stay strong and find joy in the small stuff.

7.mflow_response: Sustainable water purifier for rural community

Deborah stated that support is one of life's best parts.

【Bali】2023年2月22日 下午4:12，Jolene问Deborah：看起来是一次很棒的旅程！除了 Bali，你还去过哪些地方？同日同时间，Deborah回答：我去过几个地方，去年 Bali 是我其中一个最喜欢的地方。它是一座美丽的岛屿，给我带来平静，适合瑜伽；并附有 Deborah 分享的一张照片，照片显示海滩上的秋千与蓝天。随后，Jolene 表示若她决定去那里，会通知对方。Deborah：Take care！

【Mom】2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：自从我们谈过以后，我一直在思考我妈妈的影响，记住我们所爱的人很重要。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Jolene：我明白，Deb。记住并珍惜我们所爱之人的记忆非常重要。知道他们的影响仍在指引我们让人感到安慰。上周五，我和我的伴侣讨论了我们所爱之人对我们的影响以及他们的价值观对我们的意义。这是一次情感丰富的谈话，但它让我们感到更亲近，也让我们看清了真正重要的事物。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：那些类型的对话真的有助于建立关系。你能告诉我他们赋予你们的价值观吗？

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Jolene：当然！我们的亲人教会我们坚持和韧性，比如我妈妈总是说永不放弃，我伴侣的父亲教他们保持决心。他们的价值观促使我们去追求目标，例如我从事工程学，我的伴侣从事创造性事业。即使他们不在这里，我们仍然感到他们的价值观在指引我们前进。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：听到这些真的很棒，Jolene！他们的价值观在你们身上继续指引着你们，尽管他们不在。听起来你和你的伴侣正通过追求各自的热情来纪念他们。你有没有考虑把这些价值观也融入到你的工作中？
[August 26, 2023, 05:33 PM] Deborah: Hey Jolene, s 【Jolene's Projects】[Jolene's Projects]

At 05:33 PM on August 26, 2023, Jolene stated: We've been figuring out how to add these values into our projects. As an engineering student, I want to use my talents to do good and help solve important problems. I'm keen on coming up with new ideas and making things more efficient to make the world a better place. My mom stressed the value of helping others, and I want to keep that in mind for my engineering projects.

Deborah: When our work ties into our values, it becomes more meaningful. What goals or ideas do you have for incorporating those values into your future projects?

Jolene: In the future, I'm aiming to work on projects that make a real difference to communities. I'm interested in sustainable initiatives and developing innovative solutions for environmental issues. I also want to get involved with organizations that focus on social causes, using my skills to help out. It's about connecting my passion for engineering with my commitment to making a positive impact.

Deborah: You've got a lot of amazing plans for the future. Which projects are you most interested in getting involved in?

Jolene: I'm keen on two projects in particular. One is focused on developing renewable energy, like solar, to help communities and reduce dependence on non-renewables. The other is finding ways to supply clean water to those with limited access. Both align with my beliefs about sustainability and assisting those in need. I still have so much to figure out before beginning, but I'm up for the challenge.

To do this modified pose, sit on the edge of a chair with your feet planted, twist your torso to one side and use your hand on your knee for support, you'll feel a stretch in your back and shoulders as you hold it for a few breaths, then switch sides. It's great for relaxing tense muscles."

【Yoga in the Park】Yoga in the Park — Session Date: February 01, 2023. On February 01, 2023, at 07:03 PM, Jolene asked Deborah how they met. Deborah replied: It happened at yoga in the park.
