She remarked that it’s amazing how a place can mean so much. Jolene then asked whether Deborah’s mother would like it. Deborah replied that her mom really loved flowers; they always made her happy; she appreciated the simple things in life. An image shared by Deborah shows a woman holding a bouquet of red roses. Jolene commented, “Wow, that’s a great photo! How did she show you to appreciate it?” Deborah concluded, “Moments like that I’ll always cherish.” 【Yoga and Mindfulness】Yoga and Mindfulness — Session Date: August 21, 2023. At 09:11 AM on August 21, 2023, Jolene asked whether they were mostly happy or a bit of everything. Deborah answered that happiness comes from taking it slow, seeing beauty in them, and finding joy. Jolene noted that they should take time to enjoy that and not let the business of life cause them to miss out on the good stuff. Deborah stated that life can be so busy that they often overlook the small things that truly matter and that they should make an effort to appreciate them more. Jolene added that slowing down and enjoying simple moments can bring a lot of balance and happiness; she is trying to do more yoga and meditation to help relax and stay focused, and asked whether Deborah practices calming habits to feel balanced. Deborah replied that yoga and meditation help her find balance and inner peace; going out for walks and staying mindful also keep her grounded; she takes similar photos on walks. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]. Jolene described the sunset photo as gorgeous and that going for a walk and feeling peaceful must be amazing. Jolene added that the calm and peaceful feeling is nice for recharging and thinking. Deborah said it's like a reboot for me. Jolene said it's like hitting the refresh button and coming back even better. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a green cushion on a floor in front of a window]. Deborah asked what is your favorite yoga pose for rest. Jolene replied that she is a fan of savasana, aka the corpse pose, which is calming and helps her let go and surrender. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a person laying on the floor with a paper bag]. Deborah commented that the photo is funny and asked how long Jolene has been doing yoga. Jolene replied that she has been doing it for 3 years, and that it is a great way to escape studying and work stress. Deborah responded that taking time to unwind is key and that that seems just right for Jolene. Jolene concluded that she is really finding her zen again. 【Jolene's Support】Jolene's Support, Session Date: August 21, 2023. On August 21, 2023, at 09:11 AM, Deborah said "Keep it up!"; Jolene said "Thanks for your support, Deb!"; Deborah said "Good luck with everything. Stay in touch."

memories.memory: 【Jolene】On September 06, 2023 at 08:31 PM, Deborah asked Jolene how the project was going; Jolene replied that it was tough but she was chugging along. Deborah praised Jolene's strength for handling all the challenges and said, "You've got this." Jolene thanked Deborah, noting that her support meant a lot and that she would keep pushing forward. Deborah said she was here if Jolene needed her and urged Jolene to take care and rest. 【Deborah】Session Date: September 06, 2023; at 08:31 PM, Jolene asked Deborah: "What have you been doing lately?"

【Deborah's Mom】On August 21, 2023 at 09:11 AM, Deborah went to a place that held a lot of memories, sat on a bench where they used to chat, and felt nostalgia, longing, and gratitude; she brought flowers there and shared images: a photo of a flower cart on a sidewalk with flowers in it and a photo of a vase of flowers on the ground in a street. She remarked that it’s amazing how a place can mean so much. Jolene then asked whether Deborah’s mother would like it. Deborah replied that her mom really loved flowers; they always made her happy; she appreciated the simple things in life. An image shared by Deborah shows a woman holding a bouquet of red roses. Jolene commented, “Wow, that’s a great photo! How did she show you to appreciate it?” Deborah concluded, “Moments like that I’ll always cherish.” 【Yoga and Mindfulness】Yoga and Mindfulness — Session Date: August 21, 2023. At 09:11 AM on August 21, 2023, Jolene asked whether they were mostly happy or a bit of everything. Deborah answered that happiness comes from taking it slow, seeing beauty in them, and finding joy. Jolene noted that they should take time to enjoy that and not let the business of life cause them to miss out on the good stuff. Deborah stated that life can be so busy that they often overlook the small things that truly matter and that they should make an effort to appreciate them more. Jolene added that slowing down and enjoying simple moments can bring a lot of balance and happiness; she is trying to do more yoga and meditation to help relax and stay focused, and asked whether Deborah practices calming habits to feel balanced. Deborah replied that yoga and meditation help her find balance and inner peace; going out for walks and staying mindful also keep her grounded; she takes similar photos on walks. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]. Jolene described the sunset photo as gorgeous and that going for a walk and feeling peaceful must be amazing. Jolene added that the calm and peaceful feeling is nice for recharging and thinking. Deborah said it's like a reboot for me. Jolene said it's like hitting the refresh button and coming back even better. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a green cushion on a floor in front of a window]. Deborah asked what is your favorite yoga pose for rest. Jolene replied that she is a fan of savasana, aka the corpse pose, which is calming and helps her let go and surrender. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a person laying on the floor with a paper bag]. Deborah commented that the photo is funny and asked how long Jolene has been doing yoga. Jolene replied that she has been doing it for 3 years, and that it is a great way to escape studying and work stress. Deborah responded that taking time to unwind is key and that that seems just right for Jolene. Jolene concluded that she is really finding her zen again. 【Jolene's Support】Jolene's Support, Session Date: August 21, 2023. On August 21, 2023, at 09:11 AM, Deborah said "Keep it up!"; Jolene said "Thanks for your support, Deb!"; Deborah said "Good luck with everything. Stay in touch."

【Jolene goals】On August 24, 2023, at 09:34 AM, Jolene reported that life's been hectic but she's making strides toward her goals; it's tough, but satisfying. Deborah asked Jolene to tell more about it and what she has achieved. Jolene stated that her goal is to be successful in her field and make a positive impact; she has been studying, attending workshops, and networking to make it happen; she recently had the opportunity to present at a virtual conference and received positive feedback, a great experience that confirmed she is on the right track. 【Deborah encouragement】On August 24, 2023, at 09:34 AM, Deborah noted Jolene had put her heart and soul into it and asked how it felt when people gave positive feedback and what comes next. Jolene replied that she was thrilled by the positive feedback and that it felt rewarding that her efforts were appreciated; she is currently focusing on studying and gaining more experience, is considering more internships to further enhance her skills, and hopes for more updates to share soon. Deborah expressed pride in Jolene's achievements, offered help, and said, "Let me know if you need any help" and "No problem. You got this." Jolene replied, "Thanks, Deb! Your support means a lot to me." Deborah then encouraged continued progress. 【Jolene's journey】On August 24, 2023 at 09:34 AM, Jolene stated that she would not give up and would continue pushing forward; Deborah said to reach for goals and not forget to enjoy the journey; Jolene thanked Deborah, saying her support means a lot, and she will keep pushing forward and enjoy every step of the way; Deborah emphasized that the journey is as important as the destination, urged Jolene to take time for herself and find joy, and expressed belief in Jolene. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a field of sunflowers with a sunset in the background] Jolene confirmed she would follow the advice and find joy along the way, thanking Deborah for the support. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a city skyline at sunset with a body of water] Deborah stated she would always be by Jolene's side.

【Water Purifier Project】On February 04, 2023, at 09:48 AM, Jolene told Deborah she had been on an emotional rollercoaster lately but was coping. Deborah replied that all good here and asked if Jolene had anything new happening lately. Deborah said that's awesome and asked to share more about it. Jolene added that she had to plan and research a lot to design and build a sustainable water purifier for a rural community in need; it was tough, but she loved the experience. Deborah remarked that Jolene's engineering skills really made a difference for people in a rural area and asked how it felt when she saw it working. Jolene responded that it was surreal; seeing it working and providing clean water to the community was incredibly satisfying, and it reminded her of how engineering can make a difference in people's lives, giving her a sense of purpose and the feeling that she had done something good. 【Jolene Career Path】Jolene Career Path. Jolene stated she wants to keep working in engineering and continue to make a positive impact on communities in need by creating sustainable solutions, with the goal of contributing toward making the world a better place through her work. She added that she is determined to keep going and make a difference, and that Deborah's support means a lot and her encouragement motivates her to pursue her passions.

【Mom】2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：自从我们谈过以后，我一直在思考我妈妈的影响，记住我们所爱的人很重要。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Jolene：我明白，Deb。记住并珍惜我们所爱之人的记忆非常重要。知道他们的影响仍在指引我们让人感到安慰。上周五，我和我的伴侣讨论了我们所爱之人对我们的影响以及他们的价值观对我们的意义。这是一次情感丰富的谈话，但它让我们感到更亲近，也让我们看清了真正重要的事物。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：那些类型的对话真的有助于建立关系。你能告诉我他们赋予你们的价值观吗？

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Jolene：当然！我们的亲人教会我们坚持和韧性，比如我妈妈总是说永不放弃，我伴侣的父亲教他们保持决心。他们的价值观促使我们去追求目标，例如我从事工程学，我的伴侣从事创造性事业。即使他们不在这里，我们仍然感到他们的价值观在指引我们前进。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：听到这些真的很棒，Jolene！他们的价值观在你们身上继续指引着你们，尽管他们不在。听起来你和你的伴侣正通过追求各自的热情来纪念他们。你有没有考虑把这些价值观也融入到你的工作中？
[August 26, 2023, 05:33 PM] Deborah: Hey Jolene, s 【Jolene's Projects】[Jolene's Projects]
[Session Date: August 26, 2023]

At 05:33 PM on August 26, 2023, Jolene stated: We've been figuring out how to add these values into our projects. As an engineering student, I want to use my talents to do good and help solve important problems. I'm keen on coming up with new ideas and making things more efficient to make the world a better place. My mom stressed the value of helping others, and I want to keep that in mind for my engineering projects.

Deborah: When our work ties into our values, it becomes more meaningful. What goals or ideas do you have for incorporating those values into your future projects?

Jolene: In the future, I'm aiming to work on projects that make a real difference to communities. I'm interested in sustainable initiatives and developing innovative solutions for environmental issues. I also want to get involved with organizations that focus on social causes, using my skills to help out. It's about connecting my passion for engineering with my commitment to making a positive impact.

Deborah: You've got a lot of amazing plans for the future. Which projects are you most interested in getting involved in?

Jolene: I'm keen on two projects in particular. One is focused on developing renewable energy, like solar, to help communities and reduce dependence on non-renewables. The other is finding ways to supply clean water to those with limited access. Both align with my beliefs about sustainability and assisting those in need. I still have so much to figure out before beginning, but I'm up for the challenge.

Deborah added, "Pets really do make life more enjoyable and bright," and shared an image of a group of people doing yoga in a field. Jolene concluded, "I'm so thankful it's here. Plus, it's nice to have a calm creature around."

Jolene: It can bring up a range of emotions, and it's okay to feel a mix of happiness and sadness; those moments with her friends must've been meaningful to you. Jolene: Looking at old photos must have been so nostalgic; it's great that you could share that experience with friends; it's amazing how photos and memories can give us a deeper appreciation for the people we love. Deborah: Pictures really have a way of bringing back memories and making us appreciate the special bond we have with our loved ones; they remind me of how strong love is and how amazing human relationships can be; Just like this one; [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard]. 【Beach and Surfing】On September 15, 2023, at 03:09 PM, Jolene asked Deborah whether she has any special memories of that beach or simply loves surfing. Deborah concluded that Jolene's room does the job. 【Susie the Snake】On September 15, 2023 at 03:09 PM, Jolene posted a photo captioned "Here are my pals keeping me company," showing a person holding a snake in a container. memories.memory: 【Seraphim】On June 26, 2023, at 09:17 AM, Jolene posted new photos of Seraphim in the new aquarium that she bought the day before yesterday; the accompanying image shows a snake curled up in a plant filled area. Plus, it's nice to have a calm creature around."

Deborah said Sounds nice, Enjoying the journey is the main thing, so how did you two meet? [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a book and a calculator on a table] Deborah noted that your relationship started from a strong friendship and asked if you still enjoy working on engineering projects together. She remarked that it’s amazing how a place can mean so much. Jolene then asked whether Deborah’s mother would like it. Deborah replied that her mom really loved flowers; they always made her happy; she appreciated the simple things in life. An image shared by Deborah shows a woman holding a bouquet of red roses. Jolene commented, “Wow, that’s a great photo! How did she show you to appreciate it?” Deborah concluded, “Moments like that I’ll always cherish.” 【Yoga and Mindfulness】Yoga and Mindfulness — Session Date: August 21, 2023. At 09:11 AM on August 21, 2023, Jolene asked whether they were mostly happy or a bit of everything. Deborah answered that happiness comes from taking it slow, seeing beauty in them, and finding joy. Jolene noted that they should take time to enjoy that and not let the business of life cause them to miss out on the good stuff. [Session Date: July 09, 2023]

Deborah added, "Pets really do make life more enjoyable and bright," and shared an image of a group of people doing yoga in a field. Jolene concluded, "I'm so thankful it's here. Plus, it's nice to have a calm creature around."

Deborah: She is younger; she is 5 years old.

[Session Date: August 16, 2023]

[August 16, 2023, 02:58 PM] Deborah: I started with workshops and books, and now mindfulness is a huge part of my life.

Jolene concluded that having Susie around shows she can stay strong and find joy in the small stuff.

[Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a city skyline at sunset with a body of water] Deborah stated she would always be by Jolene's side.

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：那些类型的对话真的有助于建立关系。你能告诉我他们赋予你们的价值观吗？

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Jolene：当然！我们的亲人教会我们坚持和韧性，比如我妈妈总是说永不放弃，我伴侣的父亲教他们保持决心。他们的价值观促使我们去追求目标，例如我从事工程学，我的伴侣从事创造性事业。即使他们不在这里，我们仍然感到他们的价值观在指引我们前进。

2023-08-26, 05:33 PM Deborah：听到这些真的很棒，Jolene！他们的价值观在你们身上继续指引着你们，尽管他们不在。听起来你和你的伴侣正通过追求各自的热情来纪念他们。你有没有考虑把这些价值观也融入到你的工作中？
[August 26, 2023, 05:33 PM] Deborah: Hey Jolene, s 【Jolene's Projects】[Jolene's Projects]
[Session Date: August 26, 2023]

At 05:33 PM on August 26, 2023, Jolene stated: We've been figuring out how to add these values into our projects. As an engineering student, I want to use my talents to do good and help solve important problems. I'm keen on coming up with new ideas and making things more efficient to make the world a better place. My mom stressed the value of helping others, and I want to keep that in mind for my engineering projects.

Deborah: When our work ties into our values, it becomes more meaningful. What goals or ideas do you have for incorporating those values into your future projects?

Jolene: In the future, I'm aiming to work on projects that make a real difference to communities. I'm interested in sustainable initiatives and developing innovative solutions for environmental issues. I also want to get involved with organizations that focus on social causes, using my skills to help out. It's about connecting my passion for engineering with my commitment to making a positive impact.

Deborah: You've got a lot of amazing plans for the future. Which projects are you most interested in getting involved in?

Jolene: I'm keen on two projects in particular. One is focused on developing renewable energy, like solar, to help communities and reduce dependence on non-renewables. The other is finding ways to supply clean water to those with limited access. Both align with my beliefs about sustainability and assisting those in need. I still have so much to figure out before beginning, but I'm up for the challenge.

Deborah asked Jolene to tell more about it and what she has achieved. Your support means a lot to me." Deborah then encouraged continued progress. 【Jolene's journey】On August 24, 2023 at 09:34 AM, Jolene stated that she would not give up and would continue pushing forward; Deborah said to reach for goals and not forget to enjoy the journey; Jolene thanked Deborah, saying her support means a lot, and she will keep pushing forward and enjoy every step of the way; Deborah emphasized that the journey is as important as the destination, urged Jolene to take time for herself and find joy, and expressed belief in Jolene. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a field of sunflowers with a sunset in the background] Jolene confirmed she would follow the advice and find joy along the way, thanking Deborah for the support. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a city skyline at sunset with a body of water] Deborah stated she would always be by Jolene's side.

Deborah added that it's great to hear that it's been helping you out. 【Quotes & Visual Reminders】会话日期：2023年8月16日。2023年8月16日14:58，Jolene 表示这不仅有助于她掌控一切，而且在把任务从清单中划掉时也非常满足。她还分享了最新整理页面的一张照片，其中包含她最喜欢的引语之一（图片由 Jolene 分享：一本笔记本上写有引语）。Deborah 表示：我爱这句引语，令人振奋；看到它时会不会也激励你？Jolene 回应：是的，这像一个提醒，促使我坚持目标、永不放弃。Deborah 回复：明白！这样的视觉提醒像这张照片一样，可以非常有激励作用。继续专注于你的目标，Jolene，别放弃！她还补充说，上周在日落时分，我在当地一家养老院为老人带领了一场冥想瑜伽课程。大自然对找到平静很有帮助。你也尝试过正念吗？（图片由 Deborah 分享：一群人在海滩上做瑜伽。） 【Mindfulness Journey】[Mindfulness Journey]
[Session Date: August 16, 2023]

[August 16, 2023, 02:58 PM] Jolene: Haven't tried mindfulness yet, but I'm keen to give it a shot; it sounds peaceful; I could use calm in my life; I'm interested in destressing and trying mindfulness; I'll definitely look into mindfulness, and can't wait to get started.
[August 16, 2023, 02:58 PM] Deborah: I started with workshops and books, and now mindfulness is a huge part of my life.
[August 16, 2023, 02:58 PM] Deborah: I'm glad you're willing to try mindfulness; it can be really helpful; let me know if you need any help getting started; I'm happy to assist you with your journey. 【Support & Farewell】Session Date: August 16, 2023. At 02:58 PM Jolene said, "Thanks, I'll hit you up if I need anything. Bye for now."

Deborah praised Jolene's strength for handling all the challenges and said, "You've got this." Jolene thanked Deborah, noting that her support meant a lot and that she would keep pushing forward. Deborah said she was here if Jolene needed her and urged Jolene to take care and rest. 【Deborah】Session Date: September 06, 2023; at 08:31 PM, Jolene asked Deborah: "What have you been doing lately?"

【Jolene's Green Tech Outreach】[Jolene's Green Tech Outreach] [Session Date: February 09, 2023] On February 09, 2023 at 09:03 PM, Jolene proposed a volunteer program in which engineers teach STEM to underprivileged kids and suggested teaming with local schools/centers to run workshops and inviting engineers as guest speakers to show kids their career options. Deborah replied that this would be a great way to help and inspire others and asked if Jolene had a plan yet. Jolene said planning was not finished but she planned to solidify the plan and begin reaching out, and that she could start reaching out after solidifying. Deborah noted that guest speakers would provide a real-world view and asked whether Jolene had reached out to any schools or centers yet. Jolene said she had not yet reached out and wanted to solidify the plan first, but she was eager to start reaching out. Deborah expressed enthusiasm to hear how Jolene reaches out and helps the kids and asked to be informed of progress. Jolene said she would keep Deborah posted and shared sketches in the planner, with the image attached: [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a notebook with a pen and a notebook with a page of notes]. Deborah suggested she could provide more tips or information if needed. Jolene thanked Deborah and indicated she would ask if anything else was needed.

【Water Purifier Project】On February 04, 2023, at 09:48 AM, Jolene told Deborah she had been on an emotional rollercoaster lately but was coping. Deborah replied that all good here and asked if Jolene had anything new happening lately. Jolene said she had a major milestone last week that went really well, expressing relief and pride, and noting it was a huge accomplishment for her as an engineer. Deborah said that's awesome and asked to share more about it. Jolene added that she had to plan and research a lot to design and build a sustainable water purifier for a rural community in need; it was tough, but she loved the experience. Deborah remarked that Jolene's engineering skills really made a difference for people in a rural area and asked how it felt when she saw it working. Jolene responded that it was surreal; seeing it working and providing clean water to the community was incredibly satisfying, and it reminded her of how engineering can make a difference in people's lives, giving her a sense of purpose and the feeling that she had done something good. 【Jolene Career Path】Jolene Career Path. Session Date: February 04, 2023. On February 04, 2023, at 09:48 AM, Deborah asked Jolene about her career aspirations. Jolene stated she wants to keep working in engineering and continue to make a positive impact on communities in need by creating sustainable solutions, with the goal of contributing toward making the world a better place through her work. She added that she is determined to keep going and make a difference, and that Deborah's support means a lot and her encouragement motivates her to pursue her passions.

【Engineering Project Wrap-Up】On June 06, 2023 at 03:56 PM, Jolene stated that she had finally wrapped up the tough engineering project last month and shared an image of a solar powered vehicle with a solar panel on the back. Deborah congratulated Jolene on wrapping up the project, noting that the work paid off. Jolene added that she was really proud of herself for sticking it out despite the problems and finishing it, calling it a big milestone.

memories.memory: 【Max and Luna】On August 26, 2023 at 05:33 PM, Deborah stated that having a pet around is such a calming feeling and that they bring a great sense of comfort; she still has cats, Luna sitting on the left (image: two cats sitting on a window sill looking out). Jolene asked for the second cat's name. Deborah replied: Max; they bring lots of joy and peace to our home (image: a photo of a brown leather chair and a black and white floor). Jolene asked how she got them. Deborah said Max is my mother's cat, and I took him when my mother passed away (image: a car with a fan and a mesh bag). Jolene asked how Luna. Deborah: I took Luna from the shelter. Deborah added: I really love cats, and they also need a home, love, and care. Moreover, Max is already old, he is 8 years old. Jolene asked Luna's age. Deborah: She is younger; she is 5 years old.

【Mom Stories】Deborah: On September 15, 2023, at 03:09 PM, she reconnected with her mom's old friends; their stories made her tear up and reminded her how lucky she is to have had her; [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a living room with a couch and a fire place]. Jolene: It's great you could reconnect; hearing stories about loved ones can be tough but also comforting. Deborah: Hearing stories about my mom was emotional; it was both happy and sad to hear things I hadn't heard before; it was a mix of emotions, but overall it was comforting to reconnect with her friends. Jolene: It can bring up a range of emotions, and it's okay to feel a mix of happiness and sadness; those moments with her friends must've been meaningful to you. Deborah: Wow, it was so special; a glimpse into her life beyond what I knew; through their eyes, I appreciate her more; Here I am and my mom; [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of two women in pajamas taking a selfie in a mirror]. Jolene: That looks like a blast! What did you and your mom's friends do on that day? Deborah: We reminisced and looked through her photos; it was really sweet. Jolene: Looking at old photos must have been so nostalgic; it's great that you could share that experience with friends; it's amazing how photos and memories can give us a deeper appreciation for the people we love. Deborah: Pictures really have a way of bringing back memories and making us appreciate the special bond we have with our loved ones; they remind me of how strong love is and how amazing human relationships can be; Just like this one; [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard]. 【Beach and Surfing】On September 15, 2023, at 03:09 PM, Jolene asked Deborah whether she has any special memories of that beach or simply loves surfing. Deborah said the beach is super special to her because it's where she got married and discovered her love for surfing, and it is always filled with joy and peace. Jolene remarked, "What pleasant memories." 【Yoga and Home Relaxation】[Yoga and Home Relaxation]
[Session Date: September 15, 2023]

At 03:09 PM on September 15, 2023, Deborah shared a photo of a woman doing a yoga pose on the beach. Jolene asked whether the pose helps Deborah relax. Deborah stated that doing this on the beach is peaceful—the ocean, sand, and fresh air create a super relaxing atmosphere and constitute the perfect way to take care of herself. Jolene stated that she creates her own serene yoga space with candles and oils for extra chill vibes and mentioned trying a new style of meditation in Thailand with flowers. Deborah replied that the same applies to her. An image shared by Jolene shows a photograph of a couple of towels sitting on top of a table. Deborah commented that the environment can enhance practice. Jolene added that surroundings affect mood and zen and that creating a place that feels safe and chill is key. An image shared by Jolene shows a bed with a colorful blanket and pillows. Deborah observed that the bed looked comfy and inviting and asked where Jolene usually relaxes at home. Jolene answered that in her room she relaxes, describing it as her little haven for peace and rest—the perfect spot to relax and recharge after a busy day. Deborah concluded that Jolene's room does the job. 【Susie the Snake】On September 15, 2023 at 03:09 PM, Jolene posted a photo captioned "Here are my pals keeping me company," showing a person holding a snake in a container. Deborah commented, "It's awesome how pets can bring us comfort and peace when we need it." Jolene said, "Susie is a great companion." Deborah stated, "The love pets give is priceless." Jolene concluded, "Plus, they make life a lot brighter!"

【Deborah's Father】January 27, 2023, 09:49 AM: Deborah told Jolene that her dad passed away two days ago; the sudden death left the family shell-shocked, and she is channeling grief by spending more time with family and cherishing the memories, these moments reminding her to live life fully; an image shared by Deborah shows a photo of a woman hugging a woman who is sitting on a couch. Deborah said yeah, Jolene, she’d sit there every night with a book and a smile, reading was one of her hobbies, it was one of her favorite places in the house, and she shared an image of a view of the sky from an airplane window. Jolene stated that her goal is to be successful in her field and make a positive impact; she has been studying, attending workshops, and networking to make it happen; she recently had the opportunity to present at a virtual conference and received positive feedback, a great experience that confirmed she is on the right track. 【Deborah encouragement】On August 24, 2023, at 09:34 AM, Deborah noted Jolene had put her heart and soul into it and asked how it felt when people gave positive feedback and what comes next. Jolene replied that she was thrilled by the positive feedback and that it felt rewarding that her efforts were appreciated; she is currently focusing on studying and gaining more experience, is considering more internships to further enhance her skills, and hopes for more updates to share soon. Deborah expressed pride in Jolene's achievements, offered help, and said, "Let me know if you need any help" and "No problem. You got this." Jolene replied, "Thanks, Deb! Your support means a lot to me." Deborah then encouraged continued progress. 【Jolene's journey】On August 24, 2023 at 09:34 AM, Jolene stated that she would not give up and would continue pushing forward; Deborah said to reach for goals and not forget to enjoy the journey; Jolene thanked Deborah, saying her support means a lot, and she will keep pushing forward and enjoy every step of the way; Deborah emphasized that the journey is as important as the destination, urged Jolene to take time for herself and find joy, and expressed belief in Jolene. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a field of sunflowers with a sunset in the background] Jolene confirmed she would follow the advice and find joy along the way, thanking Deborah for the support. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a city skyline at sunset with a body of water] Deborah stated she would always be by Jolene's side.

【Deborah's Routine】Session Date: February 25, 2023. At 04:50 PM, Jolene asked Deborah what her daily routine looks like. Deborah stated that in the morning she meditates, does yoga, and teaches classes; yesterday she went for a morning jog for the first time in a nearby park and will now incorporate this into her daily routine; in the evenings she spends time with loved ones. Jolene asked why she decided that; Deborah replied, Exercise is key for me - it makes me feel connected to my body. Jolene commented, This is a great healthy habit! Deborah added, It's like they say - "Can't pour from an empty cup." Looking out for ourselves gives us the energy to help others. And don't forget, you're worth it too! Jolene concluded, Thanks, Deb. Your words really mean something to me. I'll keep remembering to prioritize self-care.

【Jolene's surfing plan】On March 22, 2023, at 05:35 PM, Jolene said she is thinking about learning to surf and needs to find spare time; she has been gathering information, watching videos, and has obtained a beginners' guide to surfing, and she must find the right time and place to get a lesson. Deborah replied that surfing is a dream worth pursuing, encouraged Jolene to take the steps, and urged her to believe in herself and keep going, and she shared an image: a photo of a row of surfboards leaning against a palm tree. Jolene said the support pumped her to try surfing and she will keep pushing herself to make it happen. Deborah reminded Jolene that the experience matters just as much as the end result, advised stepping by step and having fun along the way, and affirmed that she can do it. Jolene thanked Deborah for the boost.

Deborah remarked that Jolene's engineering skills really made a difference for people in a rural area and asked how it felt when she saw it working. Jolene responded that it was surreal; seeing it working and providing clean water to the community was incredibly satisfying, and it reminded her of how engineering can make a difference in people's lives, giving her a sense of purpose and the feeling that she had done something good. 【Jolene Career Path】Jolene Career Path. She added that she is determined to keep going and make a difference, and that Deborah's support means a lot and her encouragement motivates her to pursue her passions.

Deborah asked for a favorite memory with the pet to share. Jolene recalled many memories, including the little 'snake adventure': the snake got out and Jolene spent hours searching, and she was relieved when she finally found the snake snuggling under the bed, which showed how much Jolene loves her. An image shared by Jolene shows a snake in a tank with sand and plants. 【Snake Adventure】On July 09, 2023 at 07:37 PM, Deborah asked Jolene what it was like when Jolene found her, saying she could imagine the relief. Jolene replied that seeing her snuggled under the bed made her feel love and gratitude, and it made her realize how important she is to Jolene. 【Animals and Gratitude】Session Date: July 09, 2023. On July 09, 2023 at 07:37 PM, Deborah said that animals bring so much joy and remind us of what's important, and Jolene said that animals teach us a lot about love and gratitude, and they bring so much joy.

【Deborah's Pets】On July 09, 2023 at 07:37 PM, Deborah states she hasn't introduced you to her pets yet and that she doesn't like dogs, which is why she has cats. An image shared by Deborah shows two cats sitting on a couch with a blanket. Jolene asks how often she takes them out. Deborah replies that exercise and nature are really important to her, so she takes them out for a run in the park every morning and evening. An image shared by Deborah shows a person walking on the beach with a surfboard. Jolene says she'd love to experience that every day. Deborah concludes that nature helps her find peace every day. 【Jolene's Snakes】[Jolene's Snakes]
[Session Date: July 09, 2023]
On July 09, 2023 at 07:37 PM, Jolene stated that it's a pity that her snakes don't run; she would love to do that more often, as they would motivate her and, together, it would be more fun. An image shared by Jolene shows a person walking on the beach with a surfboard.

【Mom Stories】Deborah: On September 15, 2023, at 03:09 PM, she reconnected with her mom's old friends; their stories made her tear up and reminded her how lucky she is to have had her; [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a living room with a couch and a fire place]. Jolene: It's great you could reconnect; hearing stories about loved ones can be tough but also comforting. Deborah: Hearing stories about my mom was emotional; it was both happy and sad to hear things I hadn't heard before; it was a mix of emotions, but overall it was comforting to reconnect with her friends. Jolene: It can bring up a range of emotions, and it's okay to feel a mix of happiness and sadness; those moments with her friends must've been meaningful to you. Deborah: Wow, it was so special; a glimpse into her life beyond what I knew; through their eyes, I appreciate her more; Here I am and my mom; [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of two women in pajamas taking a selfie in a mirror]. Jolene: That looks like a blast! What did you and your mom's friends do on that day? Deborah: We reminisced and looked through her photos; it was really sweet. Jolene: Looking at old photos must have been so nostalgic; it's great that you could share that experience with friends; it's amazing how photos and memories can give us a deeper appreciation for the people we love. Deborah: Pictures really have a way of bringing back memories and making us appreciate the special bond we have with our loved ones; they remind me of how strong love is and how amazing human relationships can be; Just like this one; [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard]. 【Beach and Surfing】On September 15, 2023, at 03:09 PM, Jolene asked Deborah whether she has any special memories of that beach or simply loves surfing. Deborah said the beach is super special to her because it's where she got married and discovered her love for surfing, and it is always filled with joy and peace. Jolene remarked, "What pleasant memories." 【Yoga and Home Relaxation】[Yoga and Home Relaxation]
[Session Date: September 15, 2023]

At 03:09 PM on September 15, 2023, Deborah shared a photo of a woman doing a yoga pose on the beach. Jolene asked whether the pose helps Deborah relax. Deborah stated that doing this on the beach is peaceful—the ocean, sand, and fresh air create a super relaxing atmosphere and constitute the perfect way to take care of herself. Jolene stated that she creates her own serene yoga space with candles and oils for extra chill vibes and mentioned trying a new style of meditation in Thailand with flowers. Deborah replied that the same applies to her. An image shared by Jolene shows a photograph of a couple of towels sitting on top of a table. Deborah commented that the environment can enhance practice. Jolene added that surroundings affect mood and zen and that creating a place that feels safe and chill is key. An image shared by Jolene shows a bed with a colorful blanket and pillows. Deborah observed that the bed looked comfy and inviting and asked where Jolene usually relaxes at home. Jolene answered that in her room she relaxes, describing it as her little haven for peace and rest—the perfect spot to relax and recharge after a busy day. Deborah concluded that Jolene's room does the job. 【Susie the Snake】On September 15, 2023 at 03:09 PM, Jolene posted a photo captioned "Here are my pals keeping me company," showing a person holding a snake in a container. Deborah asked, "Hey, that's Susie or Seraphim? How long has he been hanging out with you?" Jolene replied, "It`s Susie! I've had her for two years now." Deborah commented, "It's awesome how pets can bring us comfort and peace when we need it." Jolene said, "Susie is a great companion." Deborah stated, "The love pets give is priceless." Jolene concluded, "Plus, they make life a lot brighter!"

【Deborah's Routine】Session Date: February 25, 2023. At 04:50 PM, Jolene asked Deborah what her daily routine looks like. Jolene asked why she decided that; Deborah replied, Exercise is key for me - it makes me feel connected to my body. Jolene commented, This is a great healthy habit! Deborah added, It's like they say - "Can't pour from an empty cup." Looking out for ourselves gives us the energy to help others. And don't forget, you're worth it too! Jolene concluded, Thanks, Deb. Your words really mean something to me. I'll keep remembering to prioritize self-care.

To do this modified pose, sit on the edge of a chair with your feet planted, twist your torso to one side and use your hand on your knee for support, you'll feel a stretch in your back and shoulders as you hold it for a few breaths, then switch sides. It's great for relaxing tense muscles."

7.question: What was the video game console that Deborah's parents got her at age 10?

memories.memory: 【Yoga Pals】Yoga Pals — Session Date: September 03, 2023. On September 03, 2023 at 02:14 PM, Deborah described attending a cool event last week aimed at supporting each other and a community meetup last Friday; both experiences underscored how connected we are and the importance of relationships, and she asked Jolene if she had been connecting with anyone lately. Jolene responded that she is really thankful for her significant other right now, and that it's great to have someone encouraging her goals; she asked Deborah about her friends and family and any updates on that front. Deborah replied that relationships with family and friends are vital; her yoga pals have been her second family, and they've held each other up through a lot; the other day she found this old photo, which was when she first started doing yoga; her mum was her biggest fan and source of motivation, and she would often come to her classes with her. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a woman sitting on a yoga mat with two children]. Jolene said that our loved ones are supportive; when she was 10, her parents got her that, and it was the start of her passion for video games. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a nintendo game console and a game controller]. Deborah then asked whether Jolene learned on her own or if they taught her. 【Monster Hunter: World】On September 03, 2023, at 02:14 PM, Jolene stated that she taught herself, but her dad was always supportive and her mom would play games with her; an image shared by Jolene shows a Nintendo Wii game system with a game on the screen. Deborah noted Jolene's parental support and asked what was her favorite game to play with mom. Jolene replied that one of her favorites was Monster Hunter: World, citing its immersive story and open-world gameplay as amazing. Deborah commented that immersion can be freeing. Jolene agreed that it is her way to de-stress and take a break from life. 【Finals Week】Finals Week; Session Date: September 03, 2023. On September 03, 2023, at 02:14 PM, Jolene stated she has been focusing on studying and her relationship with her partner, and that they are taking little trips to the beach to relax. Deborah asked what’s up this month and if anything fun is happening. Jolene added that she has a lot of finals coming up this month and has been studying real hard; it’s quite stressful, but it will be worth it in the end, and she is thinking about taking a trip somewhere to relax and recharge afterward. Deborah wished good luck and offered to assist.

【Deborah's Mom】On August 21, 2023 at 09:11 AM, Deborah went to a place that held a lot of memories, sat on a bench where they used to chat, and felt nostalgia, longing, and gratitude; she brought flowers there and shared images: a photo of a flower cart on a sidewalk with flowers in it and a photo of a vase of flowers on the ground in a street. She remarked that it’s amazing how a place can mean so much. Jolene then asked whether Deborah’s mother would like it. Deborah replied that her mom really loved flowers; they always made her happy; she appreciated the simple things in life. An image shared by Deborah shows a woman holding a bouquet of red roses. Jolene commented, “Wow, that’s a great photo! How did she show you to appreciate it?” Deborah concluded, “Moments like that I’ll always cherish.” 【Yoga and Mindfulness】Yoga and Mindfulness — Session Date: August 21, 2023. At 09:11 AM on August 21, 2023, Jolene asked whether they were mostly happy or a bit of everything. Deborah answered that happiness comes from taking it slow, seeing beauty in them, and finding joy. Jolene noted that they should take time to enjoy that and not let the business of life cause them to miss out on the good stuff. Deborah stated that life can be so busy that they often overlook the small things that truly matter and that they should make an effort to appreciate them more. Jolene added that slowing down and enjoying simple moments can bring a lot of balance and happiness; she is trying to do more yoga and meditation to help relax and stay focused, and asked whether Deborah practices calming habits to feel balanced. Deborah replied that yoga and meditation help her find balance and inner peace; going out for walks and staying mindful also keep her grounded; she takes similar photos on walks. [Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]. Jolene described the sunset photo as gorgeous and that going for a walk and feeling peaceful must be amazing. Jolene added that the calm and peaceful feeling is nice for recharging and thinking. Deborah said it's like a reboot for me. Jolene said it's like hitting the refresh button and coming back even better. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a green cushion on a floor in front of a window]. Deborah asked what is your favorite yoga pose for rest. Jolene replied that she is a fan of savasana, aka the corpse pose, which is calming and helps her let go and surrender. [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a person laying on the floor with a paper bag]. Deborah commented that the photo is funny and asked how long Jolene has been doing yoga. Jolene replied that she has been doing it for 3 years, and that it is a great way to escape studying and work stress. Deborah responded that taking time to unwind is key and that that seems just right for Jolene. Jolene concluded that she is really finding her zen again. 【Jolene's Support】Jolene's Support, Session Date: August 21, 2023. On August 21, 2023, at 09:11 AM, Deborah said "Keep it up!"; Jolene said "Thanks for your support, Deb!"; Deborah said "Good luck with everything. Stay in touch."

【Deborah's mom's house】Session Date: August 30, 2023. On August 30, 2023 at 11:46 AM, Deborah stated that last month she visited her mom's house, which holds a special place in her heart; her mom had good and bad times there, but it's still a symbol of her mother's strength and the love she shared with Deborah; an image shared by Deborah shows her husband in front of the house. Jolene asked, "What was it like?" Deborah replied, "It brought back fond memories as I relaxed outside." Deborah added, "It's special for me. How about you? Is there a place that helps you relax?"

【Video Games】在2023年8月19日凌晨12:52，Jolene 表示计划把学习与爱好并行管理，并询问 Deborah 是否玩过电子游戏。Deborah 回应称过去玩过一些电子游戏，但已经有一段时间没玩了，认为电子游戏是在忙碌一天后放松的好方式，并询问 Jolene 是否有游戏建议，以及她最喜欢的游戏是什么。Jolene 给出几条游戏推荐：Switch 平台的 Zelda BOTW 是出色的开放世界游戏，Animal Crossing: New Horizons 非常平静且可爱；至于最爱的游戏，很难只选一个。Deborah 表示很酷的推荐，会去看看，并问及 Jolene 关于玩电子游戏的最美好记忆；Deborah 共享了一张图片，显示一男一女坐在电脑前的椅子上。Jolene 最后补充：Overcooked 2 是一款很适合联机的合作游戏，若你喜欢搞笑且混乱的烹饪场景，这款游戏不错；我和伴侣常常为了打赌而一起玩，我曾赢得三份大型披萨。
[August 19, 2023, 12:52 AM] Jolene: Wow, that's aw 【Husband Bonding】会话主题：Husband Bonding；会话日期：August 19, 2023。

2023年8月19日 12:52 AM，Deborah 表示这让她想起过去与丈夫一起玩游戏的情景，双方轮流玩耍是增进感情和留下共同记忆的好方式，游戏确实能让人更亲近，对吧？

2023年8月19日 12:52 AM，Jolene 回应：是的，你说得对！和那个人一起玩时，最喜欢的游戏是什么？

2023年8月19日 12:52 AM，Deborah 表示：我们更喜欢一起玩侦探类游戏。 【Other Activities】Other Activities; Session Date: August 19, 2023; August 19, 2023, 12:52 AM, Jolene: What other activities do you both enjoy doing together?

【Deborah and Jolene: Community & Game Meetup】Session Date: September 12, 2023. At 02:18 PM, Deborah stated that a supportive community definitely helps and that people can motivate and encourage each other; she recently played a game whose name she does not recall, described as a card game about cats in which players take cards one by one from a deck and then attack the opponent with them, and she will definitely play it with Jolene. An image shared by Deborah shows two children standing on yoga mats in a room. At 02:18 PM, Jolene stated that she looks forward to meeting Deborah and playing this game.

【Deborah's Father】January 27, 2023, 09:49 AM: Deborah told Jolene that her dad passed away two days ago; the sudden death left the family shell-shocked, and she is channeling grief by spending more time with family and cherishing the memories, these moments reminding her to live life fully; an image shared by Deborah shows a photo of a woman hugging a woman who is sitting on a couch. Jolene expressed condolences and asked how it's going for Deborah and her family. Deborah replied that, even though it's hard, it's comforting to look back on the great memories; we looked at the family album; photos give me peace during difficult times; this is my parents' wedding in 1993; an image shared by Deborah shows a photo of a bride and groom posing for a picture. Jolene said they were a beautiful couple. Deborah stated that her husband and she are trying to be as good a family as her parents were. Jolene asked what you value in your relationship. Deborah answered that it is love, and openness that have kept us close all these years; being there for each other has made us both happy; look what letter I received yesterday; an image shared by Deborah shows a note written to someone on a piece of paper. Jolene asked who this letter is from. Deborah replied that the group members sent this to me; they thanked me for the positive influence I had on them; those moments remind me why I'm so passionate about yoga. 【Deborah's Mother】On January 27, 2023, 09:49 AM, Jolene asked Deborah where she most often does yoga. Deborah replied that this is one of the places where she does it, and she shared an image: a photo of a living room with a television and a window. Jolene asked where it is. Deborah said that’s my old home; I go there now and then for my mom, who passed away, and sitting in that spot by the window gives me peace. Jolene said it must be great to have that place where you feel connected to her. Deborah said yeah, it’s special; I can feel her presence when I sit there and it comforts me, and she shared an image of a window seat in a room with a window. Jolene said wow, it sounds like that spot holds a lot of sentimental value; does it bring back any special memories? Deborah said yeah, Jolene, she’d sit there every night with a book and a smile, reading was one of her hobbies, it was one of her favorite places in the house, and she shared an image of a view of the sky from an airplane window. Jolene asked what other hobbies did your mother have. Deborah answered Travel was also her great passion!

【Deborah Yoga Event】在2023年8月19日12:52 AM的对话中，Deborah表示她一直专注于教授瑜伽并与社区互动，上个月组织瑜伽活动非常棒；她还提到为促成活动联系了附近的多家商家和场所，活动内容包括瑜伽、食品摊位，甚至有现场音乐，效果非常棒。Jolene询问是否看到大家聚在一起的回报、希望了解筹办过程，以及在爱好与学业之间保持平衡的建议。Deborah回应说在平衡爱好与学习方面，优先排序并有效管理时间很有帮助，制定时间表并专门安排学习和追求爱好的时间对维持平衡有很大作用。 【Anna】[Session Date: August 19, 2023]

[August 19, 2023, 12:52 AM] Deborah: Last Friday I told Anna the story of my life and they were super kind about it, and it was nice to have a meaningful connection. How's the mindfulness workshops and reading going? Need any help?

[August 19, 2023, 12:52 AM] Jolene: Life's been hella busy since we last talked. I bought a console for my partner as a gift on the 17th and it's so much fun, he even managed to play it. Engineering studies are still going strong too. Balance has been key for me lately. How about you? What's been up? [Image shared by Jolene: a photo of a black xbox console with a yoda yoda figure next to it]
【Content】Session Date: August 21, 2023. On August 21, 2023, at 09:11 AM, Jolene stated that a new console game was given last week and that the game is Battlefield 1.

【Susie the snake】会话日期：2023年1月27日。时间：09:49。

Jolene：我想给你看看我的其中一条蛇，这条蛇总是让我平静并让我开心。这是 Susie。图像：床上有蛇头从床里伸出。

Deborah：养宠物确实能让生活变得更亮，宠物带来安慰。你有任何与宠物相关的有趣时刻愿意分享吗？

Jolene：我在玩电子游戏时，宠物从笼子里滑出，蜷在我旁边——太好笑了！这是我的第二条蛇 Seraphim 做的。看她那狡猾的眼睛！图像：蛇头从毯子探出。

Deborah：啊，那真不错！

Jolene：Susie 是我在 Paris 一年前买的。

Deborah：Cool, Jolene! Pets bring so much happiness!

Jolene：它们是非常不寻常的宠物！这是我和我的伴侣上周一起游戏的情景——真的很有趣。我们在主机上玩游戏“Detroit”。我们都对这项活动着迷！图像：一个人躺在床上，狗在看电视。
[January 27, 2023, 09:49 AM] Jolene: I want to show 【Walking Dead and Detroit gaming】January 27, 2023, 09:49 AM: Deborah asked Jolene if her boyfriend taught her to play; Jolene replied that she learned to play on her own as a child.

January 27, 2023, 09:49 AM: Deborah asked whether Jolene only plays old games or tries new ones; Jolene said they are planning to play "Walking Dead" next Saturday.

【Underwater Life】On September 17, 2023 at 01:24 PM, Deborah stated she has been interested in underwater life but has not had the chance to try scuba diving yet; she has been spending time remembering her mom, and last Sunday she visited her mom's old house and sat on a bench, an experience that was comforting and as if she could feel her mother's presence guiding her and reminding her of her love. 【Mom's Baking Memories】September 17, 2023, 01:24 PM — Jolene asked Deborah what she remembers as special about her mom. Deborah described that her mom had a big passion for cooking and would make amazing meals for them, each full of love and warmth, and she can still remember the smell of her mom's special dish filling the house and bringing them together. Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a bowl of food with a spoon in it. Jolene then asked for Deborah's best memory of cooking with her mom. Deborah recalled that she loved it when her mom would bake pineapple birthday cakes for her when she was a kid, which always made her feel special. Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a pineapple cake with a smiley face on it. Deborah then asked Jolene if she had ever had something like that with someone close. Image shared by Deborah: a photo of a mixer with a whisk in it. Jolene replied that she used to bake cookies with someone close to her. Image shared by Jolene: a photo of four chocolate chip cookies on a baking sheet. Deborah asked what Jolene's favorite cookie to make is. Jolene stated that the warm, gooey chocolate and soft, buttery cookie are a match made in heaven. Deborah concluded that she really wants to eat this now.
